subject: The case for impeaching Secretary Mayorkas

body:

---
Peter, It's no secret that our border is a complete and utter disaster. A mix of incompetence and deliberate decisions have led to...
* Deadly drugs flooding across the border into our neighborhoods.
* Millions of unvetted illegal immigrants crossing and released into our communities
* Cartels essentially seizing operation control of the border.

And at least one person who MUST be held responsible:**Biden's Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=590781252fcf4ba5880af1af1f5f5dae&_e=9nRkUrZyHjj8xkDoywIOnJmjmVh49U_pXTHD5zpbt_KkgzlfXlmYe946HFClhnOmMyxG68SGCcstWHkAb31rN90QfdoOxnZ1mEILyh0sp601QhlA3HgwUO0W-qWNc6wkRiKt4y7ELTX1CP2JZlE9VChp5bJoSyzMyFpPBa4O_VMKxyq0U3lfqLH-bM-AZSReA4LCBHqDJf707jCiR0RVblA7FrXw7AEEUVYevMGqNHIJI3EildarOV1iN966Zx-o0JqnWbvqjfRsL0jDNcQzEBkUR8yzfDvLM8ZNuB1FHkrVo3iYrMP-9pXICQly5m2TBv4cSsTGBP7OZy5O1FtNdXkOrNVQHbWNfhkeoloPZO9iizl2q7Hq4XEAYVKqE4HUu5Gt4yh-lBPfm4R72T6Wrw%3D%3D)

**Congress****MUST****impeach Secretary Mayorkas for: **➡️ For presiding over the worst border crisis in history ➡️ For lying to Congress about the border➡️ For slandering Border Patrol agents➡️ For failing to maintain operational control of our southern border
---
[**IMPEACH MAYORKAS >> CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=590781252fcf4ba5880af1af1f5f5dae&_e=9nRkUrZyHjj8xkDoywIOnJmjmVh49U_pXTHD5zpbt_KkgzlfXlmYe946HFClhnOmMyxG68SGCcstWHkAb31rN90QfdoOxnZ1mEILyh0sp601QhlA3HgwUO0W-qWNc6wkRiKt4y7ELTX1CP2JZlE9VChp5bJoSyzMyFpPBa4O_VMKxyq0U3lfqLH-bM-AZSReA4LCBHqDJf707jCiR0RVblA7FrXw7AEEUVYevMGqNHIJI3EildarOV1iN966Zx-oWSdtCCpGo0DwRjEcKnz3LXpspbfe6VapUTQ8iSQFb5Ag9j1l3ES39tPwG_o6V0jIepILU9_k6iAjRpvf4nnHjkguAheLDtXQ9VZFFsnQZBk6yszphfiu9s2O5xUFB2sSwLKaKpVQYZcvH5xUvoeSHA%3D%3D)

body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed an appeal brief with the Delaware Supreme Court on behalf of itself and the Daily Caller News Foundation, asking it to overturn a lower court’s decision blocking release of records about the U.S. Senate records of President Joe Biden housed at the University of Delaware.

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61881&L=28713&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtZHJvcHMtNC01LW1pbC1vbi1wcm9ncmFtLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[U.S. Drops $4.5 Mil on Culturally Appropriate Program to Help Asians Quit Smoking](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61881&L=28713&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtZHJvcHMtNC01LW1pbC1vbi1wcm9ncmFtLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** The U.S. government is dedicating $4.5 million to enhance a “linguistically and culturally appropriate” program to help Asians quit smoking. It is known as the national Asian language quitline and provides cessation counseling, nicotine replacement therapy (NRT), and in-language materials for tobacco users who speak Chinese, Korean, and Vietnamese (CKV). The cash will flow through a Centers for Disease Control (CDC) offshoot called Office on Smoking and Health. With an annual budget of nearly $10 billion, the CDC is the federal agency responsible for protecting public health. It operates under the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) and claims to work around the clock to protect America from health, safety, and security threats whether diseases start at home or abroad. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed an appeal brief with the Delaware Supreme Court on behalf of itself and the Daily Caller News Foundation, asking it to overturn a lower court’s decision blocking release of records about the U.S. Senate records of President Joe Biden housed at the University of Delaware. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 23, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed an appeal brief with the Delaware Supreme Court on behalf of itself and the Daily Caller News Foundation, asking it to overturn a lower court’s decision blocking release of records about the U.S. Senate records of President Joe Biden housed at the University of Delaware. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch, the government watchdog group, announced recently that President Donald J. Trump, the 45th President of the United States, made a keynote address to Judicial Watch’s Annual Roundtable, a private event, which was held at the Trump National Doral in Miami, FL, on the evening of Thursday, January 19. = ---|--- | | | | = | = “We have already established collusion between the University of Pittsburgh and the NIH over the fetal organ ‘chop shop’ in the University of Pittsburgh paid for with federal tax dollars,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Biden administration turned the spigot back on for taxpayer funding of this barbarism, and we want the details.” = ---|--- | | | | | The U.S. government is dedicating $4.5 million to enhance a “linguistically and culturally appropriate” program to help Asians quit smoking. It is known as the national Asian language quitline and provides cessation counseling, nicotine replacement therapy (NRT), and in-language materials for tobacco users who speak Chinese, Korean, and Vietnamese (CKV). The cash will flow through a Centers for Disease Control (CDC) offshoot called Office on Smoking and Health. With an annual budget of nearly $10 billion, the CDC is the federal agency responsible for protecting public health. It operates under the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) and claims to work around the clock to protect America from health, safety, and security threats whether diseases start at home or abroad. ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner Former President Donald Trump is taking the training wheels off his third presidential campaign weeks after criticism said that he was not taking his third White House bid seriously. == New York Post “If the Secret Service is doing its job, there has to be visitor records,” Tom Fitton, president of conservative transparency group Judicial Watch, told The Post in October. “If there aren’t any records, the scandal is much bigger than just a lack of transparency.” == Townhall Among the records is a “nonclinical overview” from Moderna showing a statistically significant number of rats from mothers who were given the vaccine born with skeletal deformations. | CLIPS | | | == | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved = |

body:
Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | |
---
This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. **[Will you make a $10 donation to the DNC to renew your membership? clean_body: Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | | This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. As the only party organization responsible for electing Democrats from the school board to the Senate, the DNC powers critical programs that help to protect our fundamental rights, hold the GOP accountable, and provide Democratic candidates nationwide with the resources necessary to win. Last November’s midterms were only the most recent step in our work to pass the Biden-Harris agenda and lower costs for working families. The DNC is already making critical investments in organizing and voter protection efforts that Democrats will rely on to win in the years to come, but they need your support. We appreciate all of your hard work. It means so much. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. body:
and help us STOP these BAD bills coming out of Olympia | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5e24a74b3e&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

**Along with a multitude of bad bills, there are a few good bills being introduced in Olympia, some of which are being sponsored by both Republicans AND Democrats. **

[HB 1363 / SB 5352](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=38f94097e3&e=6a281f566d), restoring police pursuits, is a good example of bipartisanship at work in Olympia, **however, they are being blocked by radical Democrats in leadership positions**. Senator Manka Dhingra, chair of the Law and Justice committee, is blocking this bipartisan legislation from making its way to the Senate floor.

---
|
---
| We encourage you to both [email Senator Dhingra here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6e8bc046aa&e=6a281f566d) and tell her to allow SB 5352 to move through her committee, and register your [PRO position here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d6b16ee8d5&e=6a281f566d) on this good piece of legislation coming out of Olympia.
---
| [Email Senator Manka Dhingra TODAY!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=904507ef29&e=6a281f566d "Email Senator Manka Dhingra TODAY!")
---
| While there is some bipartisanship taking place in Olympia, Democrats are still up to their partisan games and pushing a number of BAD bills in Olympia. It is imperative that you TAKE ACTION and register a CON position to stop radical Democrats in Olympia from making these bad bills LAW. [You can view a full and updating list of bad bills on our Olympia Watch page. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=849dc71932&e=6a281f566d)

* **HB 1325 / SB 5451:** Democrats want to release more criminals EARLY.

Hey friends,

Going to keep this short and sweet.

Now that I have been sworn in for another term representing the people of Iowa in the U.S. Senate, I want you to know my top priorities include:

_**1\. Iowa (Iowa is always #1 on my agenda)
2\. Lower drug prices
3\. Bring fairness to the cattle market
4\. Back the Blue
5\. Write the new Farm Bill
6\. Secure our border
7\. Restore fiscal discipline
**_
**[Chip in if you're with me! I need your help to get all these things done. ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=ca62aa0160a14c2bb2f9d9240baba347&_e=8XhYSTDkv7r256NYKeEq9LXQ4KuBlbmOb6zuyXKGZ7KczWBE_w-W841fvd_dqQotkT9tbabjoCkyRVvJe05fL_R0mnlOGPo3yGPVM-9eXBBfcwo_vr8F88nLo7k8DXxYJaNsTgmkQLJ2UJG7ZVOy8qM1A_7oMs5ADitxB8LumxminRam-T1XG-SZDyNgYi0UDGLu1eidfhLv88DBCyqm2yYBLtkXLsKUzGYM00IJSMBedCpL7hOr86xmIzH_3lBLgEwzou-ELgnpTUBHT8PzKSePup95oWXUEsNkRAtxEeE0SfCW-XkK5s9LuwXdSo6zKB-6Uu2E4ijNpW4768z2ZTXIOWBw1smIO8eWs0MqBcjazUiDwODv6G8CKGdrMj2Oyua-sABP23j2E9G-hlpxtCe3orcrQqlSDuzhuWTSWb70EwoiwM7pxsfR1_IACsTCp1GeB04uw4Yy_ZcVpdBTh7uG2QJBzIuOpuw7aAhYYZk%3D) **

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: can you help?
body:
Peter, I was honored to be sworn into office as Congressman on Tuesday before the community I'm humbled to represent and serve, my family, and others who traveled to support me.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nktvul-iubikjttk-r/) Peter, I was honored to be sworn into office as Congressman on Tuesday before the community I'm humbled to represent and serve, my family, and others who traveled to support me.I've already started on those promises I made during my campaign.**Democrats have begun to target this district. I need your help to do that!**[Chip in $25, $50, $100 or ANY AMOUNT to invest in our fight.](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nktvul-iubikjttk-j/)** [DONATE $25 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nktvul-iubikjttk-i/) [DONATE $50 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nktvul-iubikjttk-d/) [DONATE $100 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nktvul-iubikjttk-h/) [DONATE $250 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nktvul-iubikjttk-k/) [ANY AMOUNT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nktvul-iubikjttk-u/) As your Congressman,

Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-nktvul-iubikjttk-o/)

body:

They started posting pictures of my children online.

It's sick and intentionally dangerous (_I've been "SWATTED" too many times to count at this point_), and it **shows just how low the left will go to stop me from exposing their corruption.**

It's clear the Left is terrified of our investigation into the Biden family corruption and influence peddling operation, and their tactics are certain to become more desperate and dangerous. Their intimidation tactics won't stop me from exposing the corruption of Joe and Hunter Biden, but trust me, it's going to get worse before it gets better, and . The Left will do anything and everything they can to discredit my work, and I can't be worried about having the resources needed to defend myself against their attacks. . Without such a dedicated group of core supporters, none of this would be possible, and I can't thank you enough for being with me every step of the way. In Liberty, Marjorie

---

Friend,
Here’s the truth that the Radical Left doesn’t want you to know: we have two standards of justice in our Country: one for people like _you and me_ and one for the _corrupt political class_ , of which there are many.

**At the very same moment when my ultra-secure Mar-a-Lago home was RAIDED by the FBI,** Joe Biden was harboring classified documents in his China-funded Penn Center and his unsecured garage right on the floor, piles of paper.
[](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdUcuK3DAQ_Br7ZiPJsj05-LAbZyYwZAnsIZuTaEvtsTZ6GFne2cnXRzaTBwEh6KrqoqjGjjYtr6u6ammuumbgtFW57hhhFaGME84ZpyUfkAIdOFOtgrqmGSfajb5U3oFRrzGsdi6lt_nUcd4SOBAAyT7UI0hSIfKaDgSSB2WYm26KcV6y6iFjx_QWlGvA8qpdQLWZbBi8YQEWg5ZQvHrtYjGuTgXQi3aXIomsjhExSQf_jksxeXgv3rRCv5lWx7CZhqTNqj6lS8LGeoc3MRtUF_yLgvWri2nmbZrWaIVFpVebELSgjZjGO774Ncht00kjGKuEcndGgp1BX1zi7r1V4v9YhYHVyUn825hY4LeDdxH3GBsfUcj5FhZxIIcmKYQzWiXudMYvn398f3553sFJq9Ri__VED0fy9PNTHjo1X7UxemnadKHLln-_Sspn9HjrsvYxY2zfY2w_ADvzx5en5vzt3BenMDwUfVPz68ayj-mPtxn_SO8u5d7Lhrb9L10nuZQ)
Yet, while a Trump-hating special counsel is persecuting me, Joe Biden is being given white-glove treatment by a weak establishment hack who tried to cover up the Russia Hoax. **It’s a travesty.**

**Biden lied to the American People and weaponized the Justice Department.**

body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhmo2co7l12rc9sc2uk9hvqeu8v359rroh45artg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clim1o34cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1oitpbutuks9aa0915snt4hi2u0q6srbjl38fgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clim1o34cph2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdqjig8nrtccb9sngnfco0v0si5pqltg2100pkqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clim1o34cph2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlpp3em3incv64hc3bir160t3jo26srfrv964vl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clim1o34cph2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpi5pi667ls3vbibv0q1ojgsj34e08d2972fhjmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clim1o34cph2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.

# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziasjn0kl3jgf63f02luuh19eua9ee7onna6fmko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clhmaoj2chh2bs).

It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi1l5lcmsgac75s6v4ht7gtnuuo1tjdqmd2cao7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clhmaoj2chh2bs) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a["Financial Rat-Lab"](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk29dnvlkboj36aojrcel3t59s8cfd0o8h84eqq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clhmaoj2chh2bs). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjgf5ovsh7f1gph2tds2p8r2tnfj5o7q71af83qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clhmaoj2chh2bs)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.
The time on missing on great opportunities is over. **[Act today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zki83bk29mg5ggpqjf3fgaqhfi15dgdqcjnsqdcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clhmaoj2chh2bs)** Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement can significantly improve your future wealth.

Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8fhYxuP0gHwBbGaJojCwwA&sysid=1).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657614%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W%2bluAgws5E73s%2bEMYNO29Q&sysid=1) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a[ "Financial Rat-Lab"](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657625%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zwoxZG1ZutiSnSEvVXQFwg&sysid=1). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657626%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W5i67X3hZXJCDWsJew%2bNDA&sysid=1)

Friends, the radical Left has fully infiltrated our schools. They flooded higher education with disciples of the radical left who wanted to fundamentally transform America and turn it into another failed socialist experiment. Once they'd filled colleges and universities nationwide with leftist professors and administrators, it was only a matter of time before it trickled down all the way to the preschool level. That's why today, you can hardly turn on the news without hearing horror stories about school leaders and teachers encouraging students to come out as transgender or teaching them that America is an evil, fundamentally racist country. **The good news is that it 's NOT too late.** The America First Policy Institute has just released a POWERFUL new web-based tool to use in the fight against the leftist assault on our children. **Friends, today we 're honored to introduce to you the America First Parent Platform.** Here's our plan to empower parents to take back control of their children's education from radical leftist indoctrination: 1\. The America First Parent Platform provides a robust selection of model policies for state legislatures to enact that will empower parents to take back their local school boards. 2\. We created and are constantly updating the only NATIONWIDE database of school board members so that concerned parents, grandparents, guardians, and concerned citizens can easily find and contact the school board member(s) who dictate the policies that affect the children they love. 3\. Our platform gives parents a way to report radical leftist curricula and indoctrination in their local schools! Our team is working around the clock to ensure that we continue to expand the America First Parent Platform and ensure it reaches everyone who needs it... That's why we hope that you'll consider supporting the America First Parent Platform with a TAX DEDUCTIBLE gift of $15 or more today!**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z86d7mttd56vavp8rhjngivg96l2p9mq2ivrqngg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clhm1o74cth2bs) Friends, at every turn, the radical Left is trying to ensure that they keep the power they've worked so hard to acquire in our schools. They're dumping millions of dollars into local school board campaigns. They have the teachers' unions on their side. Their buddies in big tech are censoring and suppressing information that would shine transparency on their efforts. And they'll stop at NOTHING to put America LAST and corrupt the minds of our children. [_**Friends, PLEASE use this opportunity to get in your last-minute tax deductible donation and help save our country from left-wing indoctrination.**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi21n38um30kjir42ttla40cnsosvto0v03b3dv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clhm1o74cth2bs) Sincerely, America First Policy Institute

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sherrod Brown is a national treasure. We can keep him in the Senate, or allow a spoiled brat resembling Donald Trump, Rick Scott & Vance take the seat and have its progressive values do a total 180 towards autocracy.
body:
Vital Ohio Senate seat to protect in 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T552e34d6-374b-48c5-b0bc-0b5feca8a999/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Sherrod Brown a bright light in Ohio, and for working people and progressives across the country._** _Because the Ohio GOP controls nearly everything in my state, defies our courts and uses gerrymandering and now an egregious voter suppression law just passed to be handed what they can't win, they have a lock on most positions of power._ **_Sherrod's defied them, winning time and again._** He's a Senator because he beat then Senator Mike DeWine in '06. **_So, here comes wealthy Republican, state Sen Matt Dolan, to try to drown him in campaign cash._** Dolan won't have Peter Thiel's money (that we know of) like J.D. Vance, which upended a 50-50 race for Tim Ryan. But Dolan's loaded, as he proved by spending ~$11 Million outta pocket to lose to Vance in the GOP Senate primaries in '22. [_WE MUST begin supporting Sherrod NOW, as Dolan begins to spend millions daddy gave him to try and steal another seat. _**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to keep the exceptional Senator Sherrod Brown where he belongs, in his Senate seat in Washington fighting for our values?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e936ae6-b4a1-4f77-a207-1f80abff8217/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If you're from NYC you're likely familiar with the Dolan family's ineptitude. subject: Thank you
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57713538/388899876/814545102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI3NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQ4NjljYmEtMDA5Yy1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ShE3m5_cLBziD84Dfvn4jccfK7E_wNTrG50G7NCcfm8=&emci=86ccacc9-1999-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b4869cba-009c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2525212)
---
Friend, On behalf of my family, I wanted to thank you for making the People’s Ball exactly what it was intended to be — a festive celebration for the people of Maryland. My husband and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you there alongside us as we witnessed wonderful performances and danced the night away. So many people and small businesses worked so hard to make this night special for Maryland. From Chef Greg Pittman who designed the delicious cuisine to the local restaurants whose desserts I’m still hearing about to Time Printers and the beautiful programs they helped create — the talent in Maryland is truly unmatched. I write to you from Annapolis in our new home where we are already hard at work. My husband made a promise to the people of this state — Leave no one behind —- and I know he’s a man of his word. This will be Maryland’s decade. So thank you for bringing your fabulous “celebratory chic” selves to the People’s Ball. It was a night my family and I will forever cherish. |
---
Sincerely yours,
Dawn
[www.mooremillerinauguration.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57713539/388899877/814545102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI3NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQ4NjljYmEtMDA5Yy1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ShE3m5_cLBziD84Dfvn4jccfK7E_wNTrG50G7NCcfm8=&emci=86ccacc9-1999-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b4869cba-009c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2525212)

name: Caroline Colarusso for Congress
subject: A Message To Congresswoman Clark
body:
Parents Must Be Good Role Models
| | | |
---
|
A Message to Congresswoman Clark: Parents Must Be Good Role Models. Dear Friends, As reported today by the national media, the son of Congresswoman Katherine Clark was arrested for allegedly assaulting a Boston Police Officer at an Antifa rally. [Read Full Story Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ASBiQiywQqtRS_7t-LQrjwf5FU5tSVNH8AxgL4ci6klKokjVE5J4PLgfqkbW_wCO5EyGylsTEyMy_TSCizuqTgHQqvhTcLTUQqhtNibQzainP_cae8ePYfcIys8A_-Rbr_AR-4c809tRAmgge9Ew9NpCxB_MpDHMERIN-UfH5rbS4S5VPOZpQ7GSpJCLqdWAbTXXA38d1D1l8EP8SwkwURKoqH5M0f9MTOvbxuPolj74JT15vifoTOCH-qkYlU-_cERyRBjPJAuDwAQ3W2W-HQ==&c=PbDRbht-8q8g9q5JrEzgPqdqvEtT1xWLH88kKpKoy7_rtDzw9YyQwA==&ch=N25Z3N4IboxbUdt1yCgkFxm2KoKIfmkBcGdw9AgXDcd12Dg2qGiHjQ==)
We must remember that all children are a product of their environment, kids emulate what they see and hear. Congresswoman Clark on numerous occasions has spewed hateful remarks about Republicans as well law enforcement officials. Clearly that behavior was observed by her son. We must hold our elected officials accountable for their words and actions. In a TWEET that I sent yesterday, I reminded Congresswoman Clark that our children are always paying attention and they will imitate our words and actions. In her haste to become a national political figure this past election cycle, Congresswoman Clark apparently forgot or chose to ignore this simple reality. As you probably remember, Congresswoman Clark was arrested this past summer in Washington D.C. for protesting against the United States Supreme Court decision in the Dobbs case, which effectively overturned Roe vs. Wade.

---
|
---
| I would like to remind Katherine Clark that it is wrong to celebrate being arrested for civil disobedience. There is no way you will teach your children that this behavior is unacceptable when you as a parent publicly engage in this very same unlawful and disrespectful manner.
Join me in praying for this young man.
Thank You, Caroline

---
---

clean_body: Parents Must Be Good Role Models | | | | | A Message to Congresswoman Clark: Parents Must Be Good Role Models. Dear Friends, As reported today by the national media, the son of Congresswoman Katherine Clark was arrested for allegedly assaulting a Boston Police Officer at an Antifa rally. == We must remember that all children are a product of their environment, kids emulate what they see and hear. Congresswoman Clark on numerous occasions has spewed hateful remarks about Republicans as well law enforcement officials. Clearly that behavior was observed by her son. We must hold our elected officials accountable for their words and actions. In a TWEET that I sent yesterday, I reminded Congresswoman Clark that our children are always paying attention and they will imitate our words and actions. In her haste to become a national political figure this past election cycle, Congresswoman Clark apparently forgot or chose to ignore this simple reality. As you probably remember, Congresswoman Clark was arrested this past summer in Washington D.C. for protesting against the United States Supreme Court decision in the Dobbs case, which effectively overturned Roe vs. Wade. | | I would like to remind Katherine Clark that it is wrong to celebrate being arrested for civil disobedience. There is no way you will teach your children that this behavior is unacceptable when you as a parent publicly engage in this very same unlawful and disrespectful manner. Join me in praying for this young man. Thank You, Caroline | | ---|---|--- | | | | == == == | | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso for Congress | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180 | | Sent by mailto:info@colarussoforcongress.com in collaboration with

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7801%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=lA1Q6Uy%2fFt20X6YizcIebA&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93899%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aweKxKa5Qw6u1ggO03aSkQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93899%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aweKxKa5Qw6u1ggO03aSkQ&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=viEeAI04ujTNKpMU8xX9Dg&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93891%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8w7G%2fzQ%2fTVi2H%2fOiTIyLBQ&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93899%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aweKxKa5Qw6u1ggO03aSkQ&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93892%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KAGgNqJ2fwUfUgYvn2hDfg&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93893%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fOqNTbicVVNH2Ch6TGhMOA&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93894%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=flm%2bfVOxO%2fEQz%2fCdAwzZSw&sysid=1)
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93805%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0KuwrzXeeLE4A8bvdFYPXA&sysid=1)
---

---

name: Club for Growth Action
subject: Why we need HIM in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I have someone I want to introduce you to...
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdqiejvleaq1smtgbd3c738ivbbbeg4lf2a4r308_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)
---
| | Hey Friend, I have someone I want to introduce you to: **Congressman Jim Banks.**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49p2qhjme78bi1hdptk18hb3qn1gt2fbtg3m4tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)
---
| | Jim’s a devoted husband, a proud father of three, a current U.S. Naval Reserve Supply Corps Officer, and **he recently announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Indiana.**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN $25 or MORE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv9es5tfrgol4s3ni5jh5qg2c49qvkoci834s1b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)
---
| | In 2014, he took a leave of absence from the Indiana State Senate in 2014-2015 to deploy to Afghanistan during Operations Enduring Freedom and Freedom’s Sentinel. He received the Defense Meritorious Service Medal for his military leadership in Afghanistan.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjt71jrostf07bk317m5b8na8c1cls8ciho59l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5if1prdhhqnuivtasovmsdumbv8e7sujompk1h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)
---
| | **But his fight didn’t stop there. ** In 2016, he was elected to Congress, where he worked alongside President Trump to roll back some of the most egregious and burdensome Obama-era rules and regulations. Jim knows what it takes to balance a budget and believes Washington ought to do the same, and**that is why he was tapped to serve as Chairman of the Republican Study Committee’s Budget and Spending Task Force to get our nation’s fiscal house in order. **
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhifjhoua5ms7u6j789bc8sng4euogtk9krijh2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)
---
| | **Jim is a proven fiscal conservative leader who will fight for a pro-growth agenda, and that’s exactly why Club for Growth Action is backing his fight for the U.S. Senate. ** **[_Friend, will you send Jim Banks to the U.S. Senate to restore fiscal sanity to our government?_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zduah96a9k0roe7n3jcd2fpe32mv7kt42c7t7kog_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhi481gmunjp3vnld4l8je3ajmk711rngroclmc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs)
---
| | Thank you,David McIntoshClub for Growth Action
---

We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation. Please join the Club for Growth by contacting the Club for Growth at [www.clubforgrowth.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zue44ir5ecje3lguf81qov0650omfduj7bjobt6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cljm9or4clh2bs) or by making a contribution to Club for Growth Action or to any other federal candidate on a Club for Growth Action hosted Win Red page. name: Candace Owens
subject: Special message from Candace Owens
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243414:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)

Peter,

**Radicals** are destroying Black communities in the name of justice.

**Politicians** keep Black and minority communities dependent on government handouts.

**The Media** continues to feed us a steady diet of lies that we're victims of a racist county.

And all the while:
* **Planned Parenthood** is murdering Black babies
* **Poverty and divorce** are at an all-time high for Black families
* And the **murder rate** is astronomical.

This is all meant to keep us divided and black and minority communities with a victimhood mentality.

But in this country, _we are not divided_. It's all a myth -- just a figment of someone's sick imagination.

You can be whatever you want to pursue. You can accomplish anything with enough passion, honor, and integrity. _There is no other country in the world where Black people prosper as much as they do here_.

**That 's why I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Brandon Tatum. We are changing the narrative as we seek to abolish the victim mentality.**

So I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters by the end of the week.

[_**Peter, can you chip in any amount and be the first new supporter from your state? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243414:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)

**WHAT IS BLEXIT?**

People ask me all the time \- what does BLEXIT mean?

It's an exit from the vicious cycle of victimhood mentality promoted by the media and the Radical Left.

They teach us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, that the police are our enemies, and that racism prevents us from achieving our goals.

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

And we're doing it by going into communities where no other organization is going.

[_**Help turn victims into victors >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243414:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)

**Here 's how BLEXIT is making a difference.**

We currently have 43 chapters across the US -- _we just founded a chapter in Washington D.C.!_ -- made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! BLEXIT State Chapter members help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities locally.

Our Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum that also teaches key life skills and character development to K-8th grade students in low-income communities at no expense to the families.

Our current BLEXIT Liberation Camp sites are in Tampa, FL, and North Charleston, SC, with more site locations to come.

We're also going to historically Black colleges and universities (HBCUs) to connect with students and show them an alternative to the victimhood mentality.

Peter, can you help us end the victimhood mentality?**Click below to become the first new supporter from your state this week.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243415:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243416:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243417:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243418:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243419:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243420:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243421:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243422:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243414:Jt3pddGNJ:m:1:3331421248:FEBA818D1755D9325380610FA7096E8F:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT Foundation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, as such, donations to BLEXIT Foundation are tax deductible under the IRS code. By entering your information you consent to receiving emails, text messages and other marketing information from BLEXIT Foundation and other third party related groups. clean_body: My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?” This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: did you see this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.

The chambers of Congress are now divided. Much needed federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights and gun safety reforms will continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to keep up the fight for justice and progress.

**That’s why I set a goal to receive 5,000 responses to my brand-new focus group survey, but it looks like I’m **_still_ **missing your voice.**

Peter, I’m counting on you to join the movement. So please: **Will you add your response to my focus group survey before it locks at midnight tonight?

Here’s the best link: [https://www.surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-2023-focus-group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57718161/388917868/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk954-su-nd&refcode=jtk954-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc1MDFkMS0wZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoMcbCjw1wOFVwgR_SU2wd-JmUd4BCRzaptlO0W5xg0=&emci=5a15f1b4-599b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=357501d1-0e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Thank you for being in this fight with me.

Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Fri, Jan 20, 2023
Subject: Will you join my focus group, Peter?
| | | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57718162/388917869/1831560878?code=jtk954-su-nd&refcode=jtk954-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc1MDFkMS0wZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoMcbCjw1wOFVwgR_SU2wd-JmUd4BCRzaptlO0W5xg0=)
---
**Peter, you were in the top 5% of my supporters during my campaign last year. That’s why I’ve selected you to participate in my exclusive 2023 focus group. **
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57718163/388917870/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk954-su-nd&refcode=jtk954-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc1MDFkMS0wZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoMcbCjw1wOFVwgR_SU2wd-JmUd4BCRzaptlO0W5xg0=&emci=5a15f1b4-599b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=357501d1-0e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize this year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID: **PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP?: **NO DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.
---
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57718164/388917871/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk954-su-nd&refcode=jtk954-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc1MDFkMS0wZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoMcbCjw1wOFVwgR_SU2wd-JmUd4BCRzaptlO0W5xg0=&emci=5a15f1b4-599b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=357501d1-0e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
**This focus group is only open until midnight tonight, and I need another 549 fearless fighters to respond in order to reach statistical significance.****[_Please, will you participate in my focus group now so I know what’s most important to the people I represent? It’ll only take a moment of your time. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57718165/388917872/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk954-su-nd&refcode=jtk954-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc1MDFkMS0wZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoMcbCjw1wOFVwgR_SU2wd-JmUd4BCRzaptlO0W5xg0=&emci=5a15f1b4-599b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=357501d1-0e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Together, we made ___real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2023. Because this January, _millions_ of Americans have entered the year without the right to an abortion, _millions_ of parents have entered the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and _millions_ of LGBTQ+ individuals have entered the year fearing for their safety.

Peter, with the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress.

**But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: [_Will you accept my personal invitation to participate in my exclusive focus group? Click here to access your personalized link:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57718166/388917873/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk954-su-nd&refcode=jtk954-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc1MDFkMS0wZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoMcbCjw1wOFVwgR_SU2wd-JmUd4BCRzaptlO0W5xg0=&emci=5a15f1b4-599b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=357501d1-0e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Join Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57718167/388917874/1229846208?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk954-su-nd&refcode=jtk954-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc1MDFkMS0wZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoMcbCjw1wOFVwgR_SU2wd-JmUd4BCRzaptlO0W5xg0=&emci=5a15f1b4-599b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=357501d1-0e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize this year – but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group. | | FOCUS GROUP RECORD EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com FOCUS GROUP PARTICIPATION ID: PARTICIPATED IN FOCUS GROUP?: NO DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. | | This focus group is only open until midnight tonight, and I need another 549 fearless fighters to respond in order to reach statistical significance. Together, we made real progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2023. Because this January, millions of Americans have entered the year without the right to an abortion, millions of parents have entered the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and millions of LGBTQ+ individuals have entered the year fearing for their safety. Peter, with the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress. But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: | | Thank you for making your voice heard. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: TN House District 86 Election Happening TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
January 24, 2022
Dear friend,
TN House District 86 is holding a special election TODAY to fill the vacancy created following the passing of Representative Barbara Cooper. These are big shoes to fill. We hope that you'll do your part if you're in TN House District 86 and get out to vote.
So far the turnout has been low. What we know about democracy is that it flourishes when more people are civically engaged and bend government to their will at the ballot box.
You can find out if you're in District 86 and what your polling location is at this link [https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/] . The polls will be open from 7 AM-7 PM.
We hope you'll consider contributing to TVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1] as we seek to register more voters and increase voter turnout all throughout 2023.
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Democrats are the Party of Death.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243423:6uHoddGWN:m:1:3334294963:9637E44CE27B854FFC0927779C241437:r "Headline") Peter: **The Democrats are the Party of Death.** They don't care about our babies, even voting against a bill requiring doctors to save the life of a child born alive as a result of a botched abortion. They don't care about our young people, forcing the unnecessary COVID shot on them even though more die every day from heart failures and blood clots. They don't care about those who die from fentanyl. To them, it's the price to pay for keeping the Southern Border wide open. It's time to hold these merchants of death accountable! That's why I'm honored to be placed on the Oversight and Accountability and Homeland Security committees in Congress. It's now time to take the fight to the Dems and hold them to account for the thousands if not more who have died as a result of their lies and corruption! **[Help me hold the Dems accountable and expose the entirety of Brandon and the Dems' corruption with your donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243423:6uHoddGWN:m:1:3334294963:9637E44CE27B854FFC0927779C241437:r "Help me hold the Dems accountable and expose the entirety of Brandon and the Dems' corruption with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** No longer can Brandon and his leftist allies silence me by kicking me off the House Committees. No longer can Hunter skate free from a lack of investigation into his laptop. No longer can Mayorkas escape accountability for his disastrous and criminal handling of the Southern Border. **I. WILL. HOLD. THEM. ALL. ACCOUNTABLE!** **[But if I'm going to succeed, I need to know you've got my back. Stand with me by chipping in today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243423:6uHoddGWN:m:1:3334294963:9637E44CE27B854FFC0927779C241437:r "But if I’m going to succeed, I need to know you’ve got
my back. Stand with me by chipping in $50, $100, or $250 today.")** The left spent years lying to the American people and trying to control our lives so they could force their Marxist agenda. Every day, we learn the extent of their lies and the grave consequences of their actions. **The truth will not be enough. They must pay for their actions.** Don't delay! We need to show the Deep State that nothing will stop us from holding them accountable. **[Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243423:6uHoddGWN:m:1:3334294963:9637E44CE27B854FFC0927779C241437:r "Donate today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Joe Kent
subject: How much has Joe Biden cost you?
body:
Dear Patriot,
As we pass the two year anniversary of Joe Biden's Presidency, I have a question for you: how much has it cost you?

As a country, it's caused us international humiliation in Afghanistan as we left our own people behind and $7 billion of military equipment.
It cost us over one months wages in inflation driven by Biden's runaway government spending.
It cost us our national sovereignty as we've seen a record number of illegal immigrants flood across the border that Joe Biden has left wide open.
And it costs us the lives of 175 Americans every day who've lost their lives to fentanyl trafficked across that open border.
I'm running for Congress to put a stop these assaults on the people of our country. Please help me win by supporting my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/xbLLhTxCdrbTxTMVKVC0JQ/BXZJHq874YwnrTvrQPdZqQ).
My Democrat opponent is one of the most far-left members of Congress. She believes that inflation is caused by **the government not spending enough.** She is so extreme on the abortion issue that she voted to deny medical care to newborn infants.
This seat is our best pickup opportunity to help secure a Republican majority in the next Congress.
Help me flip it red by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/xbLLhTxCdrbTxTMVKVC0JQ/BXZJHq874YwnrTvrQPdZqQ).
And please consider hitting the "make this monthly" button when selecting your contribution amount.
Thank you!
Respectfully,

Joe Kent
PS: Joe Biden has cost our country too much over the last two years. Help me fix the problems by flipping our seat RED and donate today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/xbLLhTxCdrbTxTMVKVC0JQ/BXZJHq874YwnrTvrQPdZqQ).

Unsubscribe: https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/BXZJHq874YwnrTvrQPdZqQ

**Good News First**
In November, 1776 Project PAC helped elect a conservative school board in Brandywine, Michigan with four winning candidates. Tonight, they will hold their [first meeting and vote for curriculum transparency](https://substack.com/redirect/a29a512b-d156-4177-ab33-8ac34bd7f165?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and stricter oversight of sexually explicit materials in the classroom.
We have to protect children, flipping boards and securing stalwart school board members is how it's done.
**Wisconsin At Stake**
If you care about the future of public education in Wisconsin, it's time to pay attention to this year's race for the state Supreme Court. Control of the court is on the ballot this spring, and the contest could decide the fate of redistricting. Though for school districts, the election means more than just a fight over lines on a map.
Numerous special interest groups are working against 1776 Project PAC and the parents of Wisconsin schools, and we need your help. If liberals pick up another seat on the court, they will have a rock-solid majority that never deviates from liberal activism. 1776 Project PAC is hoping to fund, train, and assist candidates in the critical swing state. Conservatives have controlled the court since 2008, and this election is liberals' last chance for a while; if conservatives win the seat, they will hold a majority on the court until at least 2026. We are determined to help elect school board candidates who demonstrate a commitment to protect parental rights and priority to elevate education without indoctrination.
The fight over preserving institutions in Wisconsin isn't cheap, support our fight by donating today.
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/88f60609-a330-4d21-a16e-ae94c3ad9db0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**CRT Undercover**
It took a while for parents to figure out what kind of trash was being taught to their children, and it took the Left a bit to figure out what kind of force those parents could be. Leftists certainly don't like to believe Critical Race Theory is being taught everywhere--or perhaps they'd just rather everybody else not know about it. A Georgia teaching activist was recently placed on administrative leave from D.C. based education nonprofit LearningLab after admitting he illegally smuggled critical race theory into schools and kindergartens, against state law. Quintin Bostic was [busted by Project Veritas](https://substack.com/redirect/c2d38fb4-68b9-403c-a950-7b70fefa26ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for bragging to a journalist about Critical Race Theory. In the video, Bostic is boasting about how he has successfully implemented the curriculum into two school districts; Cobb County and Fulton County.
In 2022, Republicans in Georgia's legislative chambers [vowed to rid the state's schools of CRT](https://substack.com/redirect/1baba296-1daf-4d47-ac94-b47d4759fe69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in April CRT was legally banned. In May, when angry parents were attending local school board meetings to complain about how race, diversity and equity were addressed in classrooms, Governor Kemp urged the state Board of Education "to ensure that critical race theory and its dangerous ideology do not take root in our state standards and curriculum."
CRT is the theory; SEL is the delivery system; none of it belongs in public schools.
[Share 1776's Newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/6bce97cf-6a8a-447b-ba93-22a3ac0037eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keeping Parents In The Dark**
Radical queering advocates in education have moved on from just encouraging children to transition and be confused about gender; they now want to [quietly assist student transitions](https://substack.com/redirect/d7492425-40c7-4a87-9286-46783f71e690?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) without notifying parents. This emerging trend is especially concerning considering the trend is occurring simultaneously in Canada and pages are being taken [directly from the canadian playbook](https://substack.com/redirect/6d569903-5056-47cd-9a00-455933b61049?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) where school boards successfully urged schools to both automatically honor requests to change a student's name and pronouns, and not to tell parents if requested.
Virginia is getting out in front of the issue, with a [bill currently in the works](https://substack.com/redirect/56295618-294e-411a-9e68-b6cfbcdf39aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that would require educators to contact the parents of transgender students. Leaving any name or pronoun changes up to the discretion of the school creates unnecessary confusion and increases the probability of rogue educators and aides intentionally misdirecting ill-informed students. Advocates for L.G.B.T.Q. youth are countering with the argument that parents should stop scapegoating schools and instead ask themselves why they don't believe their children. Once again, parents are being villainized by educators and radical activists who seem to believe that they -- not the parents -- know what is best for their children.
[Follow 1776 Project PAC on Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/ce67c498-bb3a-448a-b9ed-85d61d0c381c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Despite the insanity coming out of courts, think tanks, and teachers' unions, 1776 Project PAC is continuing to fight, sticking to our mantra of greater parental control. There are 31 states that have school board elections this year. School boards are made up of members of the community who care about their children's futures and their communities' futures. Who wouldn't want to be a part of that? Run, volunteer, and save your children's schools.
It's up to principled Americans to step up and defend parental rights, support 1776 Project PAC by making a donation today.
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/88f60609-a330-4d21-a16e-ae94c3ad9db0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7804%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=oBae38zJ%2fxlG3c8xPGS%2fCA&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93810%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ty%2b1fEeb2Dtc6GOi%2fCDddg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93811%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QjvGlGH5nA%2fX2VYOOWAEMg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93810%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ty%2b1fEeb2Dtc6GOi%2fCDddg&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93812%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fmeDOaNdY8xU5QN2yNijBQ&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93810%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ty%2b1fEeb2Dtc6GOi%2fCDddg&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93813%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WDzPGkX3OJoCgmwsI97vsQ&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93814%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6tEZZexvfcrF2QZEHo5cgg&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c93825%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DMj2SradJEF56cPIXKXjpw&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. I was proud to share my new book, The College Scam, with President Donald Trump. I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel.
