name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8uk9ilkpn5st8gqq2bsc44oj9cn08ji8nkdj3vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpi1m6mvm2k0q32lc1lgplhthimob9o1ve0edlug_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zui8gbb509b4hmg67sgdl45p4rtqfqe251dkmgao_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztr0fku42o3qh636nn9umbqb0guchuhim97h8dp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znp3bujc4ctmltonmm0pk9e13hc980jhpois5490_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhnnpk524d07ccfsi7smvp7aa4u5ssjrtgjnrgf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb2h4e7lt8b6loj57ra8feejqqo2nab02qjmkuco_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp85vt1ob9p9i3i1j1ppa3javlri626ctb7si3j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge8ob4clh2bs)

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: Will I see you today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Our live event with Sen. Tina Smith starts at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=2&akid=13240%2E53494%2ENL5O9N) Friend, in just a few hours I'll be discussing our groundbreaking roadmap to achieve 100% clean power by 2035. Can I count on you to be there? [_**Make sure to join me, Senator Tina Smith, Dr. Leah Stokes, Manish Bapna, and Lissa Lynch TODAY at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT for this live virtual event! (Haven't RSVP'd yet? It's not too late—click here!)**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=3&akid=13240%2E53494%2ENL5O9N) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=4&akid=13240%2E53494%2ENL5O9N) This new policy paper from Evergreen and NRDC (Natural Resources Defense Council) is a huge deal—it has the potential to guide executive and state actions and change the course of our country's clean energy transition. And I can't think of a better collection of climate champions to help debut it. That's why I'm so excited to invite you to this special event. See you soon—I'll be looking for your name in the virtual audience! Onward, Sam Ricketts
Co-founder, Evergreen Action | [RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4416?t=5&akid=13240%2E53494%2ENL5O9N)

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

subject: We’re suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for you
| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm0fn508146veelk748q2kjjk158ie4u74jruvu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge4pj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl3iqrldkkqrfut0aah9uao34b0bomg2mlrb0h2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge4pj4c9h2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zamqfm1982edreajj1phrq0a9u7be0a4ujpk7gho_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgo6nh9gu8ne93jnjulaom1e056952hm1dcgv688_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znokflnoporevcgf28sbqvrhntatdlv6gk93rotg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9cl2vejghmvnq9oqrhhjsea7b5iqjli7q6c3pro_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zafer4v4g7qnd44tm4e0vrcbmpt89o7rhmeshep0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zus69qfsfqp4uendsmgkqji72u7135ot3tb3u6cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4606etanor5b614aubrifivimhlk76j3g2f0p18_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdpv11ic7kld52t6adqecfhsc3tkai4vuacikjcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb2cdh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: =?utf-8?Q?Working=20Warriors=20Foundation?=
subject: here's how you can help veterans in 2023
body:
Click here to learn more >>> | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=73a09e6630&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Hi! My name is Marshall Bush and I’m emailing you on behalf of the Working Warriors Foundation.
My grandfather, the late President George H.W. Bush, taught me how to “Be a Point of Light.” To me, this means doing whatever we can to help others, help our communities, give back, and leave the world a better place than it was when we got here. | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7cb21a2032&e=fdefed58de)
---
| I’m working with the Working Warrior Foundation to extend my grandfather’s legacy and support our veterans and transitioning service members.
**Right now, over 350,000 of our veterans are unemployed and almost 10% are homeless.** We owe them a debt of gratitude that can never be repaid, and that’s why the Working Warrior Foundation is helping fund efforts to create new opportunities in the civilian world.
**Our 2023 fundraising drive has just begun and we’re counting on the generosity from citizens like you to support our nation’s heroes.** | | | | [HELP US SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e1adc7115a&e=fdefed58de)
---
This year, we are partnering with a number of organizations that specialize in creating jobs, housing, and other opportunities for our service members and their families.

With a donation of just $30, you can help us create a brighter future for our veterans across our country. **[Please click here to place your secure donation or click the button below!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ce89f0456c&e=fdefed58de)**
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=79fbb69ff9&e=fdefed58de)
---

Best regards,

Marshall Bush
Working Warriors Foundation

name: Candace Owens
subject: Special message from Candace Owens
body:
Radicals are destroying Black communities in the name of justice.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z08f1jppjeg14g96m0kn6q5rd3kingm7ljiac0k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)

Friend,

**Radicals** are destroying Black communities in the name of justice.

**Politicians** keep Black and minority communities dependent on government handouts.

**The Media** continues to feed us a steady diet of lies that we're victims of a racist county.

And all the while:
* **Planned Parenthood** is murdering Black babies
* **Poverty and divorce** are at an all-time high for Black families
* And the **murder rate** is astronomical.

This is all meant to keep us divided and black and minority communities with a victimhood mentality.

But in this country, _we are not divided_. It's all a myth -- just a figment of someone's sick imagination.

You can be whatever you want to pursue. You can accomplish anything with enough passion, honor, and integrity. _There is no other country in the world where Black people prosper as much as they do here_.

**That 's why I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Brandon Tatum. We are changing the narrative as we seek to abolish the victim mentality.**

So I've set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters by the end of the week.

[_**Friend, can you chip in $5, $10, $35, or any amount and be the first new supporter from your state? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi243udkgktej82e25fjl2n8gt6h2f6stkq660ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)

**WHAT IS BLEXIT?**

People ask me all the time - what does BLEXIT mean?

It's an exit from the vicious cycle of victimhood mentality promoted by the media and the Radical Left.

They teach us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, that the police are our enemies, and that racism prevents us from achieving our goals.

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

And we're doing it by going into communities where no other organization is going.

[_**Help turn victims into victors >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn4b5qroqpr9fa2gc0ctov3mp0ufb4i61je6kh5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)

**Here 's how BLEXIT is making a difference.**

We currently have 43 chapters across the US -- _we just founded a chapter in Washington D.C.!_ -- made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! BLEXIT State Chapter members help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities locally.

Our Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum that also teaches key life skills and character development to K-8th grade students in low-income communities at no expense to the families.

Our current BLEXIT Liberation Camp sites are in Tampa, FL, and North Charleston, SC, with more site locations to come.

We're also going to historically Black colleges and universities (HBCUs) to connect with students and show them an alternative to the victimhood mentality.

Friend, can you help us end the victimhood mentality?**Click below to become the first new supporter from your state this week.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdcl9lb4u8lpds7cimajc8guusda79u0omfcqd7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlcsiponkpv8r4hsr2ua69gerbidpirrofmor5qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcu132r3macopfltp52cm34j1nv6ivbdknfp8dcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcnfcpfqu1c81jrtmlk1l6igvpns5186opqe0gqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqphm4aq6sjonrlq5m5i0qmij065ognd0lk0md20_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs4a1rntsj5ru85qq6cv9e5dk7mg0u1eqdepsmj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd5opk1l3a4715728k4rgufh9im5f9rs092gt19o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4kk8eh1qmfqqcaoqoc7lk965c06h4fcqgp0luf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp0os9ovmauf0cafaq2no4cm38su0ncltrpnhj08_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6ob7cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT Foundation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, as such, donations to BLEXIT Foundation are tax deductible under the IRS code. By entering your information you consent to receiving emails, text messages and other marketing information from BLEXIT Foundation and other third party related groups. Unfortunately, we are not able to offer refunds on contributions._

Here 's how BLEXIT is making a difference. We currently have 43 chapters across the US -- we just founded a chapter in Washington D.C.! -- made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! BLEXIT State Chapter members help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities locally. Our Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum that also teaches key life skills and character development to K-8th grade students in low-income communities at no expense to the families. Our current BLEXIT Liberation Camp sites are in Tampa, FL, and North Charleston, SC, with more site locations to come. We're also going to historically Black colleges and universities (HBCUs) to connect with students and show them an alternative to the victimhood mentality. Friend, can you help us end the victimhood mentality?Click below to become the first new supporter from your state this week.** Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT Foundation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, as such, donations to BLEXIT Foundation are tax deductible under the IRS code. By entering your information you consent to receiving emails, text messages and other marketing information from BLEXIT Foundation and other third party related groups. Unfortunately, we are not able to offer refunds on contributions. If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Putting them on trial
body:

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsofpaliukdo3kg44mj2msgnsa1ol7a1qmo0gv18_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clgeap76clh2bs)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8q49l5573612qdh7r7ckvevfgakm3juf2tbn2qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clgeap76clh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrlib4590f0r81dfo0q323vplnds6cjmehu386j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clgeap76clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7oat3840iprpkgu21omj5t1e2v6ijvb48tnhcmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clgeap76clh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpull18a2sbrkmnj8f1rvk4hb9h607a007lv6d5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clgeap76clh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3g06pda9v4n6mai54qtpoiq75mm3f4ghtrho8dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clgeap76clh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjitko85tkssiuaoi3po5tdb11g11m4fmhjencco_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clgeap76clh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: Action Needed: Extreme Abortion Policy Vote THIS Week
body:
Please Call & Email Your Senators NOW! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/046ff9ef5eec/abortion-policy-in-mn-protects-sexual-predators-5904411?e=c777389c0c)
---
| | | URGENT: Please Call & Email Your State Senator Now!
---
|
---
|
# PLAMAction.org
---
|
---
| The Senate is expected to vote later this week on SF 001, which would:
* Allow 13-year-olds to get abortions without their parents ever knowing
* Make it easy for sexual predators to force their victims to get abortions
* Force taxpayers to fund abortions
* Allow women to receive abortions from physicians without licenses
* Make it easier for women coming from out of state to receive late-term abortions
* And so much more

_Please take a moment to contact your State Senator today and urge him or her to vote NO on this dangerous legislation!_

You can click on the Senators' names below to send them an email and use the phone numbers next to their names to call. A simple, "please vote NO on SF 001" will suffice!

You can learn more about this dangerous piece of legislation in the video below. Thank you for taking action today!
---
| | [ ](http://)
---

**Sample Email:**

_Senator,

I am urging you to vote NO on SF 001. It is a dangerous piece of legislation that will harm our teenage daughters and threaten women's health. Reasonable Minnesotans do not believe 13-year-olds should be able to get abortions without parental knowledge, and taxpayers should not be forced to fund abortions in violation of their consciences. There are many reasons to vote against this extreme bill. Please do the right thing and vote NO.

Sincerely,

[Your name]_

body:
Honestly, the amount is not even as important as the contribution itself.
#

Peter -
Ruben Gallego here, humbly asking you to contribute $3 to my campaign for US Senate in Arizona.
Honestly, the amount is not even as important as the contribution itself. So if it’s $3, that’d be great.
If it’s less, that’s cool too.
That’s because the money we raise will not define this campaign — it will be the people who power us forward.
So please. Become a Founding Donor to our Senate campaign. And when we win this thing, know you were a part of it from the start.
[**Use this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to become a Founding Donor to our campaign today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230124-1-15&t=1&akid=276%2E734936%2EbneR81)

---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2vp61ekd62srpoutbos19opia58014geut3atb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb1clh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbr8t9e35h4io47f5oi9fjggabi8b8anjhg68688_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb1clh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhk6k84d4bhf5usbasu7bfac053erirt1pepf0h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb1clh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfceud0re4cqqnk1vg23hk94fqm2toittv3dpp5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge6pb1clh2bs)

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

subject: Facebook must take action against dangerous Republican lies
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Facebook must take action against dangerous Republican lies >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d7531a0-ea7d-49f1-8160-49e0de6d119d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc402132-ba05-40a2-90b0-9c4549b5987b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | For years, Donald Trump pushed dangerous lies on Facebook before he was finally suspended.

**But Trump is far from the only Republican posting dangerous lies.** A wide range of elected officials, candidates, and their media enablers have been spreading lies and breaking Facebook's own rules with impunity. Everything from the Big Lie about the 2020 election to a whole host of asinine but dangerous hoaxes. And all too often, Facebook has been slow to respond -- or done nothing about it at all.

It's time for Facebook to act. [**Add your name, and tell Facebook to stop letting Republicans get away with dangerous lies.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf4c34ef-92aa-4bf6-8f14-dac399078fb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _(P.S. - you are getting this because you have supported Democratic actions and candidates in the past. But if you would rather not get these any more, just click on the "unsubscribe" link below)_

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK, The College Scam.
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z59v4bi3a94j19mt07cc9fp49hhp0nf4gsa1ccso_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq8djnlq5imkqnjp9grp3unogdgmm46s783vfha0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcv35714e0sic95qkj4uor935nms456ctfi1hvrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq6i0rrbmerjdg6taet949ujlheisqpd5ift0h08_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4mhr4e36s4n7n9vqesumhpi35dgffdqf1juq14o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zppmdg6lsibd3jj9f5sha8es2recqant31k46veg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z27d4877d27rabege4ub0amquv0vsn8nvc4d04r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2b3qagsfchuenbbmvujfaukpah808m4dbnoho68_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge1or4clh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**IT 'S OFFICIAL. **Senator JD Vance was sworn into office on January 3rd!

We'll be sharing updates about Senator Vance's travels across Ohio and work in Washington.

Thank you always for your support, and we look forward to sharing Senator Vance's good work for the People of Ohio!

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-k2knHpZQeHn96lrT1YMag78QUgM93Ivtf4Ag18ogIw0F3tU89mZrnq6pbwYfVkgoN_GKQXDWpgx2U-vuyac-051FsTv_6Uuij6KyXZOsc4RO1-698Z_z-fo_VBSapSbB8hhuaHocihyKImELl5TeWyACrZldUCI7ZwVln8RRpfmaDna-qCWIro2C30ZQEv2gLRAQv3M85BJYYH-rSyh6wgXcTnP02qnIgIxYzn7tC0uxOf6sGZafSBOVPog0r8ZrQ%3D%3D)
WASHINGTON, D.C. **[(WJW)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-k2knHpZQeHn96lrT1YMag78QUgM93Ivtf4Ag18ogIw0F3tU89mZrnq6pbwYfVkgoN_GKQXDWpgx2U-vuyac-04yc08DYf3yQUeo8bhaU6X3Leuxh2JcMEw8LYuq0fuENSj9AQzbXA0uFYcoLH5dW0UXFcigKyMH7YTgyZhYYflbzNtTOpLAbvNj6KuWmx5axFWlzg1mdr8PjVrzNTom7Hak5TBv9Hi8jX8thNBH9g9h8C79F21ylG5lzoIheh2hzQ%3D%3D)** - **JD Vance** has officially been sworn into the United States Senate.

Joined in Washington, D.C. by his wife and three children, Vance became the 58th person to serve as a U.S. Senator for the State of Ohio.

"I am honored to represent the great state of Ohio in the United States Senate. Throughout my campaign, Ohioans from all over the state issued a similar reminder: don't forget where you came from. I view this, more than anything else, as the mandate for this office," **Vance said.**

"I hope that with this position, I can lend my voice to the millions of working- and middle-class Ohioans who have been left behind by decades of failed leadership in Washington. We have a great deal of work ahead of us. I am grateful for the opportunity."

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-k2knHpZQeHn96lrT1YMag78QUgM93Ivtf4Ag18ogIw0F3tU89mZrnq6pbwYfVkgoN_GKQXDWpgx2U-vuyac-06g_fPioUIUxTiFGve4dl3f3BAAbBj6ofzqsfmL8cVMdFSEIf7jAFyOx_7THS4KFJFIo7lIyl0s5MLnoVmVBRr6aWqUdJUc3g18aJJWY9vXTgD76NshokHkpW2hp1S9cTKEM_kIOg1NxECSP5MizAJgFZKsPwf43bQmRvqKcjFVCw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-k2knHpZQeHn96lrT1YMag78QUgM93Ivtf4Ag18ogIw0F3tU89mZrnq6pbwYfVkgoN_GKQXDWpgx2U-vuyac-05MBdLUBcsuc_SDLjURekdz_6KBSo6okNofoXH4jz14H9rVcQXF0e3d1bKiDiQJpLAbwG6aG6yhqS0PrFe4_PZM-L4vnPZ5sLVSsJGnGJhm_rHjIavMzE277ISSoFcYuXiHVUjidg4OdDnTJGWQvSpMJpeJfahhsz3kXIEAz40UAw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-knx3Jf5Rn-mB8xjygurASCA-TFSaH0bSHa7Mw3lES_zCStzgBOCMMysNmfNT7lrKg4ApHmGzmb2i5RPkvXHUS_UwTGmBfnuksX1h6lZueO3TfBKwXMnpSWZYO6uIifQRLT0haimmPqq7WSlYpLiIMRfHgCc_aFQq7HKNGe6l3zDoVTxcSYlVAVuN8K6cNPXfGbg--crzaHIWdtRx4o5F4sa6obAARMdUsJ08YfSiNdM7X319EiXO6S0aXt0eNoy_TOwxITaCGjKySIG5oIAs-4J9KED-4FS0R4FMpWmPN2rPnnW0GU46xLTftAdlLnXVA%3D%3D)
WASHINGTON **[(News 5)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-knx3Jf5Rn-mB8xjygurASCA-TFSaH0bSHa7Mw3lES_zCStzgBOCMMysNmfNT7lrKg4ApHmGzmb2i5RPkvXHUS_UwTGmBfnuksX1h6lZueO3TfBKwXMnpSWZYO6uIifQRLT0haimmPqq7WSlYpLiIMRfHgCc_aFQq7HKNGe6l3zDYN64PbakDhJiWbMXhUzpEmgZsJ9RJXnnweTYoYgqJsoM0Y1YgQWmvJXkuu4kc65sEaer_uyejjmP13E3dTDikiRVUwwaNnqTloP_BwK8KoOkmpmO8Vs9i53sppkvV9BPDKJM0PmwJ8dfweH96bcYEA%3D%3D)** -- For the first time in a dozen years Ohio has a new representative in the U.S. Senate. **JD Vance** was sworn in Tuesday on the floor of the Senate.

"This is a great honor, this is an incredibly majestic place. It's a place where a lot of great things have happened," **Vance** said.

_Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: _

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-lNGTgdHAV4gTd3pU4UfCu4BRMlTjAGBjRdOlRBLsoVA14O1xU3TS5Y7DMsKqFz0Y6P-XMT35F47G5gvjTPRV7jPgbFjg7zeXIsUclfbp9vtCNvceun44xzAZD5Imntnrmz1W4JmIBQDHUDKn0Lmru7MY97U2fLznsh-UG7pQsF9kAJ-iL262Q6hCpgopxpCKYwzjNHB_LWJmJgKj8L7opdBXXUuWihR2g_v5eKExBT94HPiWMJYx8NURJRhW2iIssdURco_MSwTD5n6JpM3JPa5EJetXDS7fp7mbcNyk2E4C2d-EmM98vyF8DGCDIvmdXcW9q1tC3msuwX0YyXc-8c%3D)

**' NOW THE HARD PART STARTS'** **[(The Dayton Daily News)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-lNGTgdHAV4gTd3pU4UfCu4BRMlTjAGBjRdOlRBLsoVA14O1xU3TS5Y7DMsKqFz0Y6P-XMT35F47G5gvjTPRV7jPgbFjg7zeXIsUclfbp9vtCNvceun44xzAZD5Imntnrmz1W4JmIBQDHUDKn0Lmru7MY97U2fLznsh-UG7pQsF9kAJ-iL262Q6hCpgopxpCKeT4tnb3-i1OpSg2tZMyNfdpLdTn9uLCC6tjqNV9G2b7UVAGhoP9ZLlDUFCzwO22QuRDULrfzS8EYHh9S1GBRYL7UNkaKaaxuDWl7gPaMenqEFAGj_qkvSlDsQew8PdQThScP0pRYYVvrOwZMITPvPI%3D)** \-- The road from Middletown to Washington, D.C., has taken many detours for **James David "JD" Vance**, but the newly elected U.S. Senator believes all his successes began at home.

Without that guidance, **Vance** doesn't know where he would be today. Maybe a high school dropout. Or possibly a man with a criminal record. He wouldn't be one of Ohio's two state senators. That's for certain, he said.

_Read the entire article**[here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-lNGTgdHAV4gTd3pU4UfCu4BRMlTjAGBjRdOlRBLsoVA14O1xU3TS5Y7DMsKqFz0Y6P-XMT35F47G5gvjTPRV7jPgbFjg7zeXIsUclfbp9vtCNvceun44xzAZD5Imntnrmz1W4JmIBQDHUDKn0Lmru7MY97U2fLznsh-UG7pQsF9kAJ-iL262Q6hCpgopxpCKZBKhPKuoof4_SBohBABRDS9GG3MFpG66gHJh4AiAOtFYoNZlVZ3-7YcF-_WONlD-HtofDWdFNzcTU7m2Kt29c0VWwchO_XLJKSM7f7Ejif1OQM7fMVo0wAexJoAOLlkuBeJN9uPrWJC_hKCw4MXbjM%3D)**_

**' TOLEDO HAS BEEN VERY GOOD TO ME' ****[(Toledo Blade)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-qjuNNCR0WoQxWajQZrJYsQil87uUm47wlDOwUonHSy02IjPVumDEPj6noQR0lvclOHKTs5_i6lxhfrP_NAK1ezcUkgD3MOZkBiaPLScho1c9W38pcZ5baoYZBRNF9Q670YTFbteDyhUMramSfiusj0Dn6yQOKC5xxE0F7A0FcS5JpfHg0h_t41pvvIlC5PRBzNaQaiUyohKTPMArgI7wNZ1UQvjpM80Rwi1u2GfRqzwP8eifbVlWwlfMMhSsJV2a7K4pUPkq46Uh9zS2opfxRm_he5uCdDdrALsRhAQv3-g)** \-- Marking his first visit to the Toledo area since being sworn into office earlier this month, **U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance** toured the Ohio National Guard's 180th Fighter Wing.

"It's such an important base for northwestern Ohio, not just for the economic impact in the region, but also for the national security of the country," said **Vance**.

_Read the entire article**[here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-qjuNNCR0WoQxWajQZrJYsQil87uUm47wlDOwUonHSy02IjPVumDEPj6noQR0lvclOHKTs5_i6lxhfrP_NAK1ezcUkgD3MOZkBiaPLScho1c9W38pcZ5baoYZBRNF9Q670YTFbteDyhUMramSfiusj0GNFj_kwSnpcxBWPe7VEjfZrkMFRjyyGwzeswzr4XPKvJfbNOtA4l-tZv_A4FfTeC-LjYTvDqVik1wVrLLTYO8QhsNV8TXBbYKcbXEFqtBPLKOVVHkQQraJUjXMnfKwFESQc7MO2kQfmPvdopJ_VTl)**_

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-knx3Jf5Rn-mB8xjygurASCA-TFSaH0bSHa7Mw3lES_zCStzgBOCMMysNmfNT7lrKn525oMRwQzkGNURGMISjtgWqRE71Fc7cVZSjxJp6f04oyKrLXxGTFYTuhIDjXITaKvqJ0pyZhCyNJLghbrlfJBmNpf7mzonScCzaMui9MDCm3lfZbHLcwVTtYc4Cy9ugATfi8jC5H-kNhddSN3rO2iUahz5lcCiHmQccfkZu8DcjgXIHfjzkErPqM3fMeLAlfSYBcB1Gu-yyhkXxhHR1bTrPni-mt4c05htXB7Y8FzH0xUYdQFBYQA-hJYxY-ubGCQGTNCi9mzi-0c5JG3T_NaT2uZpAtANCpesJz0zEPMX)
**' I WANT TO BE A GOOD SENATOR FOR THE WHOLE STATE'** **[(News 5 Cleveland)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-knx3Jf5Rn-mB8xjygurASCA-TFSaH0bSHa7Mw3lES_zCStzgBOCMMysNmfNT7lrKn525oMRwQzkGNURGMISjtgWqRE71Fc7cVZSjxJp6f04oyKrLXxGTFYTuhIDjXITaKvqJ0pyZhCyNJLghbrlfJBmNpf7mzonScCzaMui9MDCm3lfZbHLcwVTtYc4Cy9ugATfi8jC5H-kNhddSN3rO2j5SRF9tn6jIm6PYUEbTbe4VneEYdh8gMSJvpL_-WY8CBXy1slBFiqm1t9aCIm4k1RcvyZB0ZlP6qyNnyLtj1SpR7KBJzyT6FUJj-9EJlS86vgECnix5V-CnYx3n8uMU3Hmthl8hckoL4ZTA_nXZttx)** \-- Yes, **[Senator Vance]** knows its place as one of the world's greatest hospitals, but this day was about seeing what they do, what they need and how he can help.

"I wanted to make sure that people get an opportunity to actually talk to me and I get an opportunity to talk to them because that's how you learn," said **Vance**.

"I want to be a good senator for the whole state."

_Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: _

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-knx3Jf5Rn-mB8xjygurASCA-TFSaH0bSHa7Mw3lES_zCStzgBOCMMysNmfNT7lrKn525oMRwQzkGNURGMISjtgWqRE71Fc7cVZSjxJp6f04oyKrLXxGTFYTuhIDjXITaKvqJ0pyZhCyNJLghbrlfJBmNpf7mzonScCzaMui9MDCm3lfZbHLcwVTtYc4Cy9ugATfi8jC5H-kNhddSN3rO2gBu1kpfpBsOc-AxuhVgnjgvJmh4il2FjoPooi4mukWIKfxmQ4cl9RZ0iuBtGIP2Qdeq2ihyC9TiTQFFW4xyOe04IqP9FMxgbe1GG4VaBBNuJJGLMZnNh7uIh_yGKCgwRcJo8s0GHW1hD97RcaqhH-a)
**' COMMEMORATING DR. MARTIN LUTHER KING JR.'** **Senator Vance** spoke at the 38th Annual MLK Birthday Breakfast in Columbus.

"We remember the lessons and values he contributed to our nation: love for our neighbors and the equality of all mankind. Dr. King's lasting legacy is not only a testament to his good works, but an example that every man, woman and child in America has the power to make a change," **Vance** said.

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-ng6QB0_YzxFUjwWJC5IFEbgzkhq-s7N_Il991r408BLR4gknk1HKool5S4KytdmXj6VLMScxecbETkoDcBMZnS8DAjwcLPdIW8haFM1ikakNPsopbWnsOlNWjTRwjlJ7mNKnEjErt-kn6cR7poY5RuaOZ2tBE55ntXimCerPYwab1xtRqiYRx5DdE34-DYGK4NGYq8dFKFGi4W7pzyHu2A%3D)
**' IT'S A PROMISE I MADE TO THE PEOPLE OF OHIO'** **Senator Vance** joined **[Fox News' Tucker Carlson](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-ng6QB0_YzxFUjwWJC5IFEbgzkhq-s7N_Il991r408BLR4gknk1HKool5S4KytdmXqYIoPExAPTK7l3UpdwRpg8CPFaJVU_zyEE4_3IGq7bqZRJW4emxOIhfj0UmUftcOu0XAxZP16kN4PIRtTo7oZ1u6lkRVsJTlvO73_7N_IzPJrxbdJhMYvQoy2SUW5pEldW8jxAkj8bok9OcjZ0_ebs%3D)** for his first national television interview since the election, laying out his plans as Senator and how he will deliver on campaign promises.

_Watch Senator Vance 's full interview below: _

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-ng6QB0_YzxFUjwWJC5IFEbgzkhq-s7N_Il991r408BLR4gknk1HKool5S4KytdmXjiHqiHtOQiUCMGrjxGVVLsYB4GOewJir--Hlo4h85nyqpirAlkUlI2MzHBhRpTtN0lVBfQ8Rujwl_I3agjsGYeh4K72YrK2LwveQaBcLdq0Zq4dUexxPykng3pH5UszWGhn01JQ7mN4bZj2exFvcUA%3D)
[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-tiOb8xoYq8m4xhb7UQWIS8Mk-yU26UJBTxAHjZ_U4J5dTRk3SRj7GuAgxtnWnL8N4NZvM5Qq_1_6ab1O_7r9yZ1Qr4dxsw4gsqnw17PFRlS0TB2m5U6dP-iL9VbUOjGQJKxXeu-pBWOAzq1lQazrQpg1UluGucIg4A47tj1937XGcncqH5ldCqxYk4zuDFECPKyshtHe1BqRsarRkh1eJ6ZeBiaviIvxbwdDcDg5pwqrHYYOw8FJbFScJvPnCa83FrL8G5mx26QsH1IsDFD-bEaNGmyxJIM9DR8zMu3SYkQ)
**' BIDEN'S CAMPAIGN AGAINST OUR ENERGY INDUSTRY'** **[(Youngstown Vindicator)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=045de00e16b24fcb89692d972e58e3b7&_e=DqUniD0cXkQEYf0SwQQb-tiOb8xoYq8m4xhb7UQWIS8Mk-yU26UJBTxAHjZ_U4J5dTRk3SRj7GuAgxtnWnL8N4NZvM5Qq_1_6ab1O_7r9yZ1Qr4dxsw4gsqnw17PFRlS0TB2m5U6dP-iL9VbUOjGQJKxXeu-pBWOAzq1lQazrQrcNKVTux6KCRqpEmUUDe5nXpmvOn-Mv1q1IgcRU_fm8rUcBEbPEhV0INeVjGhKrObzRYBW4q6SybOF2rLFREETiU8c7p1Rx-qGyB-LmPnZvXLtBQnKFcs4mcv3dSHedhCeESW296NUnUxqUcMIcowA)** - **Senator Vance** penned an Op-ed bashing the Biden Administration's considering banning gas stoves.

"That would be catastrophic for the two-in-five Ohio households and thousands of Ohio restaurants that use gas-powered stovetops. Home cooks and local restaurants prefer gas burners for a simple reason: some of us find them better to cook with and cheaper to operate. Ohioans have suffered from inflation and rising energy costs long enough and should not be forced to choose more expensive and less effective alternatives to feed ourselves and our families. But that's exactly what the Biden administration intends to do," **Vance** wrote.

J.D. Vance** and Arizona Rep. "Since the day they took office, President Biden and Secretary Mayorkas have purposefully and maliciously eroded our nation's border security. clean_body: | IT 'S OFFICIAL. Senator JD Vance was sworn into office on January 3rd! We'll be sharing updates about Senator Vance's travels across Ohio and work in Washington. Thank you always for your support, and we look forward to sharing Senator Vance's good work for the People of Ohio! WASHINGTON, D.C. - JD Vance has officially been sworn into the United States Senate. Joined in Washington, D.C. by his wife and three children, Vance became the 58th person to serve as a U.S. Senator for the State of Ohio. "I am honored to represent the great state of Ohio in the United States Senate. Throughout my campaign, Ohioans from all over the state issued a similar reminder: don't forget where you came from. I view this, more than anything else, as the mandate for this office," Vance said. "I hope that with this position, I can lend my voice to the millions of working- and middle-class Ohioans who have been left behind by decades of failed leadership in Washington. We have a great deal of work ahead of us. I am grateful for the opportunity." WASHINGTON -- For the first time in a dozen years Ohio has a new representative in the U.S. Senate. JD Vance was sworn in Tuesday on the floor of the Senate. "This is a great honor, this is an incredibly majestic place. It's a place where a lot of great things have happened," Vance said. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: ' NOW THE HARD PART STARTS' \-- The road from Middletown to Washington, D.C., has taken many detours for James David "JD" Vance, but the newly elected U.S. Senator believes all his successes began at home. Without that guidance, Vance doesn't know where he would be today. Maybe a high school dropout. Or possibly a man with a criminal record. He wouldn't be one of Ohio's two state senators. That's for certain, he said. Read the entire article ' TOLEDO HAS BEEN VERY GOOD TO ME' \-- Marking his first visit to the Toledo area since being sworn into office earlier this month, U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance toured the Ohio National Guard's 180th Fighter Wing. "It's such an important base for northwestern Ohio, not just for the economic impact in the region, but also for the national security of the country," said Vance. Read the entire article ' I WANT TO BE A GOOD SENATOR FOR THE WHOLE STATE' \-- Yes, [Senator Vance] knows its place as one of the world's greatest hospitals, but this day was about seeing what they do, what they need and how he can help. "I wanted to make sure that people get an opportunity to actually talk to me and I get an opportunity to talk to them because that's how you learn," said Vance. "I want to be a good senator for the whole state." Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: ' COMMEMORATING DR. MARTIN LUTHER KING JR.' Senator Vance spoke at the 38th Annual MLK Birthday Breakfast in Columbus. "We remember the lessons and values he contributed to our nation: love for our neighbors and the equality of all mankind. Dr. King's lasting legacy is not only a testament to his good works, but an example that every man, woman and child in America has the power to make a change," Vance said. ' IT'S A PROMISE I MADE TO THE PEOPLE OF OHIO' Senator Vance joined for his first national television interview since the election, laying out his plans as Senator and how he will deliver on campaign promises. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview below: ' BIDEN'S CAMPAIGN AGAINST OUR ENERGY INDUSTRY' - Senator Vance penned an Op-ed bashing the Biden Administration's considering banning gas stoves. "That would be catastrophic for the two-in-five Ohio households and thousands of Ohio restaurants that use gas-powered stovetops. Home cooks and local restaurants prefer gas burners for a simple reason: some of us find them better to cook with and cheaper to operate. Ohioans have suffered from inflation and rising energy costs long enough and should not be forced to choose more expensive and less effective alternatives to feed ourselves and our families. But that's exactly what the Biden administration intends to do," Vance wrote. Read the entire Op-ed ' THIS IS A MASSIVE GIFT TO THE DRUG CARTELS' \-- Republican Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance and Arizona Rep. Andy Biggs are planning on sending a letter to Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas on Wednesday which calls for answers regarding mass parole for illegal migrants in the U.S. "Since the day they took office, President Biden and Secretary Mayorkas have purposefully and maliciously eroded our nation's border security. They have presided over the worst border crisis we've seen in decades and more illegal immigration than any administration in recent history. Now, they aim to sidestep Congress and the law by granting parole to hundreds of thousands of illegal migrants," Vance said. "This is a massive gift to the drug cartels and human traffickers that are killing Americans by the day and wreaking havoc on our country. The American people deserve to know why the Biden Administration has taken this action." ' THE AMERICAN PEOPLE DESERVE TO KNOW HOW THEIR MONEY IS BEING SPENT' Senator Vance joined to discuss his demanding a full report on how the billions of U.S. dollars in financial assistance for Ukraine has been spent. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview below: ' BIDEN ADMINISTRATION CAUGHT RED-HANDED' \-- In an interview with WLWT, freshman Sen. JD Vance says the Biden administration was caught "pretty red-handed" with a push to step in over gas stoves. "Depending on which numbers you're looking at, between 20 to 40% of Ohioans cook their meals every night. So just banning those would be destructive economically, really, really challenging to a lot of families. But the flip side of it is we've got a home appliance industry in Ohio that's close to $5 billion in wages, 26,000 employees," Vance said. Read the full article ' IT'S VERY SIMPLE' \-- U.S. Senator, J.D. Vance along with North Carolina Congressman, Dan Bishop are requesting transparency from the Biden administration on security assistance to Ukraine. "It's very simple. The Biden Administration is required by law to send Congress this report at the end of the month. They should expand this report to tell us the amount of money we've sent to Ukraine, including comprehensive information showing how these funds were used," Vance wrote. "Congress has shelled out more than $100 billion to support Ukraine since last February, yet we have zero insight into exactly what this money is being spent on. The American people deserve to know exactly where this money is going," Bishop added. subject: So much work is ahead and we hope you’ll join us Derek
body:
As we look forward to this new Congress, we want to know what’s on your mind. For real.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57708152/388880410/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWY5NjNjNS1mNzliLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fm0S01dkJZHrhyLU-9b_EPw4iKLZWGye446CBxjrsUw=&emci=96053536-dc98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=21f963c5-f79b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)

We had many wins last Congress, including lowering the cost of prescription drugs, expanding paid leave for military families, serving veterans by saving the Coatesville VA, passing the biggest climate change mitigation bill in history, and so much more!
As we look forward to this new Congress, we want to know what’s on your mind. For real. The results of this survey will be read and shared with Chrissy. For real.

name: Candace Owens
subject: Special message from Candace Owens
body:
But in this country, we are not divided. It’s all a myth — just a figment of someone’s sick imagination. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0428%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QlfWgPnlt4wmGX0ADrYtrA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657798%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IEX5AmIRNUwTsKe%2b1mGnqQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

**Radicals** are destroying Black communities in the name of justice.

**Politicians** keep Black and minority communities dependent on government handouts.

**The Media** continues to feed us a steady diet of lies that we’re victims of a racist county.

And all the while:
* **Planned Parenthood** is murdering Black babies
* **Poverty and divorce** are at an all-time high for Black families
* And the **murder rate** is astronomical.

This is all meant to keep us divided and black and minority communities with a victimhood mentality.

But in this country, _we are not divided_. It’s all a myth -- just a figment of someone’s sick imagination.

You can be whatever you want to pursue. You can accomplish anything with enough passion, honor, and integrity. _There is no other country in the world where Black people prosper as much as they do here_.

**That’s why I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Brandon Tatum. We are changing the narrative as we seek to abolish the victim mentality.**

So I’ve set a goal to connect with 500 new supporters by the end of the week.

[_**Friend, can you chip in $5, $10, $35, or any amount and be the first new supporter from your state? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657799%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J1UpbOlWrx5IgZ2ywy%2fMeg&sysid=1)

**WHAT IS BLEXIT?**

People ask me all the time - what does BLEXIT mean?

It’s an exit from the vicious cycle of victimhood mentality promoted by the media and the Radical Left.

They teach us to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, that the police are our enemies, and that racism prevents us from achieving our goals.

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

And we’re doing it by going into communities where no other organization is going.

[_**Help turn victims into victors >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657790%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pw16kgOCyBa%2bU6BS3jMHZw&sysid=1)

**Here’s how BLEXIT is making a difference.**

We currently have 43 chapters across the US -- _we just founded a chapter in Washington D.C.!_ -- made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! BLEXIT State Chapter members help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities locally.

Our Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum that also teaches key life skills and character development to K-8th grade students in low-income communities at no expense to the families.

Our current BLEXIT Liberation Camp sites are in Tampa, FL, and North Charleston, SC, with more site locations to come.

We’re also going to historically Black colleges and universities (HBCUs) to connect with students and show them an alternative to the victimhood mentality.

Friend, can you help us end the victimhood mentality?**Click below to become the first new supporter from your state this week.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657791%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ih6MXu9%2fXw1qV7O0vsNswQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=abr6zu9wvQ%2bMDkRoUPjWGA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657793%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZplGZofm2C3HUHCZGo0Otg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657794%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2SLMK2UmLDyP7n9vxfuwXg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657705%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vQY131634qnj%2bls53srXtw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657706%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OeUG7J6OUQTbFlmfwng7rA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657707%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sHlG6Ga7nQzpz2dmHSiz0w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657708%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=goLxhf5RjjJWZprZYn2q9w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657709%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NCyOmEDYUxiU%2bThljp%2fGrA&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT Foundation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, as such, donations to BLEXIT Foundation are tax deductible under the IRS code. By entering your information you consent to receiving emails, text messages and other marketing information from BLEXIT Foundation and other third party related groups. Unfortunately, we are not able to offer refunds on contributions._

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0428%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QlfWgPnlt4wmGX0ADrYtrA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0428%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=QlfWgPnlt4wmGX0ADrYtrA&sysid=1)

Friend, can you help us end the victimhood mentality?Click below to become the first new supporter from your state this week.** Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT Foundation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, as such, donations to BLEXIT Foundation are tax deductible under the IRS code. By entering your information you consent to receiving emails, text messages and other marketing information from BLEXIT Foundation and other third party related groups. Unfortunately, we are not able to offer refunds on contributions. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

Here’s what we’re up against:**
* In House District 32, this previously Democratic-held seat is being contested by an anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+ Republican.
* In House Districts 34 and 35, our Democrats won – but also won elections for the US House and Lieutenant Governor. In HD-35, we’re up against an anti-abortion, pro-gun extremist who’s been seen rubbing shoulders with known insurrectionist Doug Mastriano.

Our candidates, Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely MUST win to ensure that these Republican extremists are kept out of office and that Pennsylvania Democrats can get to work fighting for working families. Unfortunately, these special elections are even _more_ expensive than anticipated because they could determine continued control of this critical chamber – Republicans are pouring money into these races, and we can't fall behind. Even in the off-year, we’re working around the clock. That’s why we’re launching our $5,000 goal to hit before January 31.

In 2022, we won big by reaching out to every voter and organizing across the district. Marcy Kaptur knows what it takes to win in a competitive district like ours, and she’s going to keep fighting for the issues that matter most to the people of Ohio.

We know there’s so much to do, but we need to continue this good work. Marcy will keep fighting for the people of Northern Ohio. That’s why we’re asking you to make a contribution to support the work Marcy has done and will continue to do this year.

with President Donald Trump._

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuv08v90kqnfovbgksjsdhafbqcal5v8qb52ereo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clge9pb4cph2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4eep3o8dns7g6fcs3bdtl8ve62far3cdsq3knm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cliecp36cjh2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3r6jks55jtf31bck4r0fp9n7qi5dbfmcsa6ekmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cliecp36cjh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0600htsmt6at0uo20cgvadf8vi61jf8fu2ulbv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cliecp36cjh2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z24kt73rfhlf3jskk15fk9itg5vpet7ckb50p1ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cliecp36cjh2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zitekjkhtnptsmoqdfqt17vc8576a122402kh5v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cliecp36cjh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfi5ce2e05eflqtgsvh9kqgvj676r21rktjjtbh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cliecp36cjh2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9p4hjhf7kdu9elrb3v1vreqm1m3bn58smhd69c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cliecp36cjh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z7p3gjq95fac39ojondccu1pf7cfk9hmf40k6evg).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zebpin2mdd8ts3a1fd7moc8vl7g0qtr3pg3llnkg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5im9pj4cpie49fg)
