name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Reflections from the Hill: My first two weeks in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Hi Peter, I'm now two weeks into my first term as your representative in Illinois 17th District, so I wanted to take a quick break in what's expected to be a busy week to share some updates and reflections from Washington. After being sworn in, my team and I quickly looked toward how we can best serve our constituents and move the country forward -- _and we are under no illusion that this job will be easy._ Republicans control the House, and they’ve already set a very disturbing tone. For starters, Kevin McCarthy was forced to cave to extraordinary demands from extremists like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene to become Speaker. Their first order of business? A bill to help tax cheats avoid paying their share. Then late last week, Kevin McCarthy stated his intention to go after Medicare and Social Security before raising the debt ceiling. Things seem chaotic, but for our part, we’re staying laser-focused on cutting through the noise to make progress for IL-17. I'll work with anyone -- Democrats and Republicans -- if it means passing good legislation. And I've already made inroads with my colleagues here in Illinois and beyond. That's what it's going to take to make progress, and the good news that we have proof that progress is possible: Last week, I was back in Bloomington-Normal to celebrate $15.8 million in federal funding allocated for electric vehicles for _Connect Transit_ as a part of the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_. As a meteorologist, I know how important it is that we replace our aging bus fleets with zero emission options -- this bipartisan funding will do just that. This is what I’m referring to when I talk about making good investments that will grow our economy, increase sustainable jobs, and keep our communities connected. I look forward to continuing to deliver for our district and, as always, I'm grateful to have you by my side. If you'd like to support our efforts toward progress, send in a donation to help us keep this seat blue. You can donate directly online here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q1-2023](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAhEqs6AkSYBRHgC_6K6_YCZC3sF6Y5WUqMpUAIejjpnXRyEaRtz7HNvx6Dtai5X02jbMNZb-2r2IOjYJ0AFuMwsCEdKnVgSWSsKr__8aoR3ZjzzEVeuN8Zq1zxy3wORIvN7KZBtk8gezYury-oNqWl8mqpVdGEg1w_BDg-urr6YbJUDEmH5NfkOcYwiP5rUzXgSxv6cwd3ZyvTTPJdPVZvlG_XA_MdLCSwwPFrt6F17bYwO1YxgKUJZ-prtMMoBqzA_5jAJtRX2J91OyBHvCrhIMfM4OwkMeqPPB1XWUu6xUxs4LLaszm8pCdpnvLBaRhsZWOsprXwNkBWZW3sKMK5ENy7cIBjvdkSw8wQO1RZtI7LPCEuQp7OoTyAqoYNu8C3hSaysoB1yJ7wVG7Xdu8PVHusROjAsHnAp9OdMhVbLxpAsTHiGrVERiCyR4oqajZ/3t4/YVZJreKlTbmS0E_NT-nOlA/h0/7Jn55huHs-y6rHjbo8awb_t7gPG2Yn2NHt528VJAlBc)** Sincerely, Eric Sorensen
---
|
---
| Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
---

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPR8vflGQoY7kXUM7jwyNXxV5EK76KthN-u7DYJS34Z3aAiSawi7NTESW0zIEhcoDlpUwZ41qcnw-NXTVToln2M82ybn4YKgnv_BrPSiKvaOVpWWh9KdjU0TJEEid_eISMwzJRKS3kC73vOUXbxYz-COPDsZRJ1alXf7bGQpC0Gw-W1RDui7YKNOfnCET8z8r2xoK1KHnpgvihVL-Kipa6FSxURmYBA0c11M6neoCspWUSYazPTEeg9cbVOllQkdvYH0C9BGsB273DZvFMZPdmQ8cVlC5YPskKn9jci5045N2fAm0nzCH_A7Fcuy_TA0194bdpsrLYbQ4LvUwo9Ho3CYuQ_dWUT1TvJA5_NnMFLDc/3t4/YVZJreKlTbmS0E_NT-nOlA/h1/HvjeqyYtA53eh46Us6QNL2hDpwfSelZvrDOcV3Toqu0)

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently.
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlhe027j3cb0qop3repsoicjnec4bpu309c5rolo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie4p70sjh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuenvtjjd6aj6d0alsljbbfj5dpamfi37an1cca0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie4p70sjh2bs)**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A case study of “early money” in campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230124 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230124]
Team,
You’ve heard me say before just how important early money is when running a successful campaign. Today, I thought I’d share a case study to emphasize just how effective it can be.
I’ve never had an easy race, but we knew my last election was going to be especially tough. At the beginning of 2022, it was already predicted to be the most competitive House race in Michigan and one of the ten most competitive in the country. Furthermore, because of redistricting, I had three entirely new counties I needed to introduce myself to.
So, we got started early – and the first thing on our list was fundraising. I know, I know, it’s everyone’s least favorite part of politics (especially mine) – but it was effective.
Because we started early, we went into the summer with around $5 million in the bank, while my opponent had less than $200,000. We were able to use this advantage to get ads on TV and online months before my opponent was able to – a critical part of introducing myself to the new area of the district. AND we were able to keep those ads on TV when pricing skyrocketed in the months leading up to the election.
The proof is in the pudding. As the election grew closer, I couldn’t go anywhere without folks recognizing me from one of my ads. I even had kids coming up to me to tell me they’d seen my ads on Youtube. We ended up winning by 5% – our biggest-ever win margin – and over-performing in many of the new areas, including my opponent’s home county, which we actually flipped from red to blue.
I don’t know what next election season will look like, but I do know that repeating last year’s successes will be critical. That’s why I’m asking if you’ll chip in below to help us get an early start! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230124]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12023?refcode=email20230124]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zckb6v0ojlac3f69d2sj5kvvbsba8424bplbuoh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie2o34cth2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhfo6s94ug9uus14ompqupcpkaavmt62umcqgih0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie2o34cth2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh0ubck1egit0cu8ssp6rld4ut4kr5hlamefnpio_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie2o34cth2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmqoce9bsp4ajac7ipq4orpsq1uvt583d6vul52g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie2o34cth2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrvvkq77sundm6mbtk3499o5rl7pml892o7sd398_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie2o34cth2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z67uda088n185i9ltf67cgf6tg916bljmkq3cdi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie2o34cth2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqd0jpdl0c8m434s4r0m8oka3e946gouguai6a8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie2o34cth2bs)

clean_body: Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited! "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device Could Save Your Life in a Dangerous Blackout Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited! Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the SEAL Survival Guide. The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... it's WHEN. A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget. Well now you can... Because for the FIRST TIME EVER you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's safe to use inside because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about... The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick Finally... a Mini Solar Generator that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone! Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE. You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe Fast Recharge Long-Lasting Battery Recharge 2,000 Times! Easy to Use Completely Portable & Easy to Use! Powers Your Favorite Devices FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included and more! That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: "I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!" Craig W. body:
Here are four states where redistricting isn’t over...
|
---

**"Here are four states where redistricting isn’t over: Alabama, Georgia, North Carolina, and Ohio" -- NBC News**
---
**[Pitch in today to help All On The Line defend fair maps.>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57725714/388947856/1245774445?refcode=20230124_AOTL_F_Redistrictingnotover_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkNWRmODczLTJiOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uSyuqTUOwXyx6cntuWPopuuhYoibkDnekWdG5ZntKmw=)**
Team -- I know we sound like a broken record, but redistricting isn’t over. Our affiliate is supporting voters in states like Alabama, where unresolved challenges over the Voting Rights Act continue to loom in the Supreme Court.
Conservative lawmakers in North Carolina are exerting their extreme views and seeking to block fair democracy and representation. At the heart of this fight for fair maps, conservative state legislatures are attempting to gain power over state elections without state courts' involvement.
[**No oversight = Less accountability**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57725715/388947857/1245774445?refcode=20230124_AOTL_F_Redistrictingnotover_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkNWRmODczLTJiOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uSyuqTUOwXyx6cntuWPopuuhYoibkDnekWdG5ZntKmw=)
In other key battleground states like Ohio and Georgia, tense battles arise as extremist conservatives attempt to impose election laws that stiffen voters' access and opportunity to select fair representation.
[**We are raising the alarm.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57725716/388947858/1245774445?refcode=20230124_AOTL_F_Redistrictingnotover_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkNWRmODczLTJiOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uSyuqTUOwXyx6cntuWPopuuhYoibkDnekWdG5ZntKmw=)
As they continue to stoop lower in their attempts to disregard the constitutional rights of voters across the country, we will continue to mobilize our grassroots activists to ensure we raise the alarm in courts and communities across the nation.
[**We must act now. Donate today to support All On The Line's democracy reform work and stop the new wave of anti-democratic tactics pushed by extremists to avoid accountability.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57725717/388947859/1245774445?refcode=20230124_AOTL_F_Redistrictingnotover_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkNWRmODczLTJiOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uSyuqTUOwXyx6cntuWPopuuhYoibkDnekWdG5ZntKmw=)

\-- Liz Wester
Advocacy Director

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

| | | Peter,
---
It’s Col. Mike Waltz.

For too long, we’ve been passive on border security.

Democrats have let cartels, drugs, and criminals pour over our borders - and in the past two years of Joe Biden’s administration Republicans have largely stood by and let it happen.

**That ends NOW.**

It’s time to go on the offensive and use the full resources of American power to go after the cartels destabilizing our Southern border.

**I’m introducing an authorization to allow the United States to use the full resources of our military to go after the Mexican cartels.**

We will no longer be pushed around at our own border, Peter.

[**If you’re ready to take down the Mexican Cartels once and for all, stand with me TODAY and FIGHT for border security.**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=17dd0b888a994be0b991b9de5f8ed040&_e=3yqgAEqY7C6TlXWer-SRJlSt1fBp8LJB-uX__XEc7oKUIV2SAPZ1d_0Ty-5S4GWlnu-2XkZEKhDHG2NdzTRTBlnJemHpCbkgr6aA4JPDZ2ViPnBOvgCxZ2rQ6O-l5LGraz7fECrcFa6OcpAuXfXO9pemK3CpSKSjOgS5JXmIeozLOPHrJwfSoddtYxAcitE9Vo1uLZqxkYS1ygC4ru4v1JF_Dba3A4Z05qEMll2k-9SLfr7PRUXeZWVjdJE21_FqvRs6KOK9cIfykI8wy0WKsBr4i7j32E7HANRgbuAqqCu5z2_m3L-GI9ayoUB9njZ8Z2GPkJbnmyO5X06JiASoLQ%3D%3D)

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7657%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vqvGi1y4GUlHnTJ1snJceg&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78778%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5LI8X0DBbwDs10G%2fKDc8%2bg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78779%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PZTFUbWYCVLv%2bTt8rNkOQA&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78778%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5LI8X0DBbwDs10G%2fKDc8%2bg&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78770%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qta0Q8sIUITEak8vGPPYkA&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78778%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5LI8X0DBbwDs10G%2fKDc8%2bg&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78771%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5xZLb3%2feuiY1WZkVMiZciw&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78772%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fL3nh9E48XH2CCy2IKTOFA&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78773%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NamIP1tLDGUftMDQslNyAw&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7657%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=vqvGi1y4GUlHnTJ1snJceg&sysid=1)_

Wade_ should have turned 50 on January 22. Instead, we’re back where we started: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57715112/388905792/1650471874?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230124_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTZmY2NiNi0wNDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjfOmhfbOJJzo8uSZwo3t1jYQ4bfaklrR396RebDxRA=&emci=e22c77b0-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9e6fccb6-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) In 1973, the right to abortion was established as a federal right by the US Supreme Court. In 2022, that decision was struck down.

I refuse to accept a radical rightwing extremist decision to eliminate federal protections for abortions. I choose to push back and fight for a fundamental right — the right to make decisions about our own bodies.

[If you stand with me and believe that Democratic leaders should keep up the fight to enshrine abortion rights into law, sign your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57715113/388905793/1650471874?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230124_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTZmY2NiNi0wNDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjfOmhfbOJJzo8uSZwo3t1jYQ4bfaklrR396RebDxRA=&emci=e22c77b0-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9e6fccb6-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) [SIGN MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57715114/388905794/1650471874?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230124_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTZmY2NiNi0wNDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjfOmhfbOJJzo8uSZwo3t1jYQ4bfaklrR396RebDxRA=&emci=e22c77b0-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9e6fccb6-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) We shouldn’t be speaking _Roe v. Wade_ in past tense. In order to have our fundamental rights protected, we need to act on it not just once a year but every single day.

[Please join me in recommitting to the fight for reproductive rights by signing your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57715115/388905795/1650471874?refcode=BWC_EM_PT_120DO_20230124_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTZmY2NiNi0wNDljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BjfOmhfbOJJzo8uSZwo3t1jYQ4bfaklrR396RebDxRA=&emci=e22c77b0-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9e6fccb6-049c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098)

Thanks for doing your part,

Bonnie

Hey Peter -Here’s the thing... I won my last race by a **razor-thin margin**. Just _**546 votes!**_

My same liberal Democrat opponent, Aspen Adam Frisch, **already** filed to run against me.

As you can imagine, left-wingers are going to rally around him **big time** after they came so close this past election.

[**We need your help now to fight back.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b7c19c125b&e=fdefed58de)

I joined 19 fellow conservatives in Congress this month to help lead the Speaker fight – and we **fundamentally changed the direction of our country.**

We took a stand and **didn’t back down.**

And you know what, just like clockwork, now I have a BIG target on my back from the radical left.

If we had come up only a few hundred votes short, **my district would have given another vote to liberal Democrat Hakeem Jeffries for Speaker.**

**So please**[**chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $250, right away to help us defend this Toss-Up seat from FAR LEFT radicals.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9ad7b34362&e=fdefed58de)

I need grassroots patriots like you to stand with me now and donate to help us fight for freedom.

clean_body: | | | Hey Peter -Here’s the thing... I won my last race by a razor-thin margin. Just 546 votes! My same liberal Democrat opponent, Aspen Adam Frisch, already filed to run against me. As you can imagine, left-wingers are going to rally around him big time after they came so close this past election. I joined 19 fellow conservatives in Congress this month to help lead the Speaker fight – and we fundamentally changed the direction of our country. We took a stand and didn’t back down. And you know what, just like clockwork, now I have a BIG target on my back from the radical left. If we had come up only a few hundred votes short, my district would have given another vote to liberal Democrat Hakeem Jeffries for Speaker. name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
im and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs88junkj04pcqehvh6664mc8kc195i6m9c11278_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clieao74cdh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zilcfetsenkg0mogv6oijla1i7lhuk5oad2aaga8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clieao74cdh2bs)**

| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1377ba00fa348688afd3001c6ef9d44&_e=Sl-vOmPDA_Qv023gki-dcgDcPumT_xouAG8EG3iHkKrNX2bBDpmKm4Rf694hxM-0w6FbtZBbt1Y6lo7gTWZfXzxA4-d2QejjWVFdoLQRtQYkKso6yflqr6LqWPij7vzgeiN4JTzCWqqVTSEZ_nHQ8EtVFSrv3xj__k4oO6xIcZJBDn_sZ8_DArc4GqRJEwyKfw4WwRwZj2m1qfUsykMPsokMkYDLhyRG6CfKIFMJCjafPGislRLySWCGyJYlTqoRaCSoM9z0dBGM6Vq7cTV4cqTomh_iLB99Oi6BB87U-Qj3Ovwo3uFZ5BBKdJDQJjBXYvpBM3mH7PeGekKhtRpyNt7EizGatJudF3qzogOJVajSZatldvpjwEXsYORQI3QBFYyH_J-hgHwRvlvw7CWDDw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1377ba00fa348688afd3001c6ef9d44&_e=Sl-vOmPDA_Qv023gki-dcgDcPumT_xouAG8EG3iHkKrNX2bBDpmKm4Rf694hxM-0w6FbtZBbt1Y6lo7gTWZfXzxA4-d2QejjWVFdoLQRtQYkKso6yflqr6LqWPij7vzgeiN4JTzCWqqVTSEZ_nHQ8EtVFSrv3xj__k4oO6xIcZJBDn_sZ8_DArc4GqRJEwyKfw4WwRwZj2m1qfUsykMPsokMkYDLhyRG6CfKIFMJCjafPGislRLySWCGyJYlTqoRYun-mtZYNvLhQjhJiGnFAznyQigxA_VNiZEDdVjjXlBG-MBWv9TyQZPi_uX6-976Wv2uc1eY3f3tCjIlKB0mtLxZ8JW6QkMbnZApge79D0lH-9WkTNofkxwAEa8K2PKPKdwL9aH2JYcFS6f-CMbRyA%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1377ba00fa348688afd3001c6ef9d44&_e=Sl-vOmPDA_Qv023gki-dcgDcPumT_xouAG8EG3iHkKrNX2bBDpmKm4Rf694hxM-0w6FbtZBbt1Y6lo7gTWZfXzxA4-d2QejjWVFdoLQRtQYkKso6yflqr6LqWPij7vzgeiN4JTzCWqqVTSEZ_nHQ8EtVFSrv3xj__k4oO6xIcZJBDn_sZ8_DArc4GqRJEwyKfw4WwRwZj2m1qfUsykMPsokMkYDLhyRG6CfKIFMJCjafPGislRLySWCGyJYlTqoRn2Xkp1mB9l89SIvtRGt2a0wDkUEVT0ndm9EdQ_9g6pIxdg_A4_l5jogbx2d1OI9MZ7vLIO43hErC8UF7Lhw6tgw96xx72gvAJdDfdhDLD0ULSbgWmYVQaUWe4gMzkjlm8r5vkpJSjEudJASpwUe6FA%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **

Peter.

Did you see what the Democrats are proposing?

_**The Strategic Petroleum Reserve is a vital national security resource that is intended to be used in case of emergencies. Sending it to our primary competitor, China, is unwise and undermines our security.**_

body:
Last election cycle, you showed up and showed out. |

| | Last election cycle, you showed up and showed out. When Fair Fight set out to turn out as many voters as possible and fight against unprecedented voter suppression in Georgia, we knew it would be a tough fight. But thanks to this entire grassroots team, we were able to scale up our efforts in 2022 when it mattered most, and make a real, tangible difference in our communities. With you on this team, we were able to counter the effects of Brian Kemp’s voter suppression bill SB 202 — which eliminates two thirds of in-person voting opportunities during a runoff — by educating voters about the hurdles imposed by new voting changes and successfully winning a second Runoff Election sending Reverend Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate for six years. I’m proud to say that our coalition delivered. Everyone knew that Georgia was going to be a critical state in the midterms, and with your support, we were able to:
* Recruit and train **thousands** of pro-democracy volunteers
* Host phone banks and made more than **1.5 million** dials to Georgia voters
* Send **12 million** text messages to Georgians to help them make a plan to vote

This is all thanks to you! But as we celebrate our 2022 wins, anti-voter Republicans across the country have already filed dozens of bills to restrict the freedom to vote in 2023 and beyond, so we’re counting on this team to be able to invest early to fight back against challenges that could affect elections to come. [**_Can you pitch in right now and make your first contribution to Fair Fight as we prepare for the critical fights ahead?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57728239/388954591/138120010?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20220124_f_donate_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODg0NDljYy0zNTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WStexJmYyhC6O2aADw5UrYjNhe9nrk_sasNJsfciB9M=) Right now, we’re planning for what we can accomplish in 2023 and beyond to make sure we’re in the position to keep reaching voters wherever they are, and alleviate voting hurdles whenever and wherever they may arise — and we’re counting on your ongoing support in this important fight. Thanks for everything. Eva Facundo,
Deputy Director of Development

| | Well, we have started our work in the new Congress, now under Kevin McCarthy's leadership, and I have to tell you... _it is not looking good._ **The first actions taken by the new Republican majority include:**
* A radical attack on abortion rights
* Slashing customer service staff at the IRS, making it harder for regular folks to get answers
* Slashing auditors at the IRS, making it easier for the wealthy and big corporations to dodge paying their fair share of taxes
* Gutting the Office of Congressional Ethics, making it much tougher to hold Members of Congress accountable when they break the rules or misbehave
* Denying the permanent extension of the child tax credit to reduce poverty

Those are not my priorities, and I know they are not yours. Even as I am voting "no, no, no" on all the nonsense, **here are my priorities and what I'm doing** for my neighbors in Northwest Washington and folks across the country:
* Staying focused on transportation, including getting answers from the FAA and the airlines about unforeseen delays and canceled flights
* Demanding accountability for public services, including the unacceptable delays in mail delivery in our communities
* Ensuring that the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law delivers on creating good, family-wage jobs and tackling the climate crisis
* Protecting voting rights across the country
* Protecting Social Security and Medicare

If that sounds good to you, **[I hope you will make an early investment in our 2024 campaign to help us build the campaign we are going to need to take back the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57717513/388915893/1596212816?refcode=2023-01-20-priorities&recurring=0&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3e202529-0c9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTIwMjUyOS0wYzljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OzaqffEEobz6sv7CFOPV0LyiVdSzjWYjninxDqGXed8=)** clean_body: | | | | Well, we have started our work in the new Congress, now under Kevin McCarthy's leadership, and I have to tell you... it is not looking good. The first actions taken by the new Republican majority include: A radical attack on abortion rights Slashing customer service staff at the IRS, making it harder for regular folks to get answers Slashing auditors at the IRS, making it easier for the wealthy and big corporations to dodge paying their fair share of taxes Gutting the Office of Congressional Ethics, making it much tougher to hold Members of Congress accountable when they break the rules or misbehave Denying the permanent extension of the child tax credit to reduce poverty Those are not my priorities, and I know they are not yours. Even as I am voting "no, no, no" on all the nonsense, here are my priorities and what I'm doing for my neighbors in Northwest Washington and folks across the country: Staying focused on transportation, including getting answers from the FAA and the airlines about unforeseen delays and canceled flights Demanding accountability for public services, including the unacceptable delays in mail delivery in our communities Ensuring that the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law delivers on creating good, family-wage jobs and tackling the climate crisis Protecting voting rights across the country Protecting Social Security and Medicare If that sounds good to you, = It will make a critical difference! name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8dvsotg45ipoacrsnue60sfsl1qqfun8usibsgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie9ob0sdh2bs)
---
Friend, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztf7b9dckgtb58imb7bojlpqgti9nkj5r6m9qe8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie9ob0sdh2bs)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just one dollar!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpnal06h0u0rjth4j9eaobcorhgnifag7rhr2m0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie9ob0sdh2bs)
---
[Get your book now](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zalauiflbh9tqfdb7u1vvat1u9hakars8ql3kbt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1clie9ob0sdh2bs)
---
Friend, I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=494d237e406b4ef5ac2169e99f344668&_e=o-M-MV-L4t7LGZcQZ1hR9JcW981Ksf9P0L1QxHEd6FlVE7f9LQWAZwq5bCALaKs-Cj-1KkFSoW6hLys-_k6oohwY7YfWotYbo9Q2yHlCfM0X5YLm_uf4Vbg5_JnPJEIXIDhDbtNvkDQb2uvMMEc4Fpz0bmlLZEUJfRhRsV8nhlIuv-MxhNUgi3-AeKP8zBPCaWY8aK3D49enhir5LP3WrOXJ81MBPd9Ux-5F7PPbMIK9uGIuiFGa18bmt-Bpxw3kTkFrrYCp01q1YTqo6i0oqJkraJud6xVMZmvla3BDdf7qo-cItSY6f1J8nGDhyzQQTstX5WQ_Uk_SsNcOLGIORxKZGaTlZmRBp9WWaAOgjK4Pnp_Pjh5cXW7OTlNd-8wG48DwPPjmu-fJsumCQYYBJQ%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family –– including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=494d237e406b4ef5ac2169e99f344668&_e=o-M-MV-L4t7LGZcQZ1hR9JcW981Ksf9P0L1QxHEd6FlVE7f9LQWAZwq5bCALaKs-Cj-1KkFSoW6hLys-_k6oohwY7YfWotYbo9Q2yHlCfM0X5YLm_uf4Vbg5_JnPJEIXIDhDbtNvkDQb2uvMMEc4Fpz0bmlLZEUJfRhRsV8nhlIuv-MxhNUgi3-AeKP8zBPCaWY8aK3D49enhir5LP3WrOXJ81MBPd9Ux-5F7PPbMIK9uGIuiFGa18bmt-Bpxw3k7edEWWB77JkaXWKzzU3MbnX8MfaGvz096Pt90no-BZ5hyUkHgwRVoOzjXknDIWIqK3mSWOp6cvb_n-Y3esPTyoEnm8mvGhrOIbioEIdZatElX4i7cvQl5dcz_8Kz01_yNXx2Anvu551habgKPbEUaw%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today – but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=494d237e406b4ef5ac2169e99f344668&_e=o-M-MV-L4t7LGZcQZ1hR9JcW981Ksf9P0L1QxHEd6FlVE7f9LQWAZwq5bCALaKs-Cj-1KkFSoW6hLys-_k6oohwY7YfWotYbo9Q2yHlCfM0X5YLm_uf4Vbg5_JnPJEIXIDhDbtNvkDQb2uvMMEc4Fpz0bmlLZEUJfRhRsV8nhlIuv-MxhNUgi3-AeKP8zBPCaWY8aK3D49enhir5LP3WrOXJ81MBPd9Ux-5F7PPbMIK9uGIuiFGa18bmt-Bpxw3k18RnA3ngm_JvkMwVWza8Ke9eAGXkKBM1EkOrpI46mNSMzIzh-zBF4axJfXCVFEfUN5W34j2nQhFj8YjEDBIHEouNHN33I_uKnCLv2ZQClhBWGNkHdQW9X7HoPlcVPUgV-bdixOcsN7SttJhJgQe7Yg%3D%3D) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=494d237e406b4ef5ac2169e99f344668&_e=o-M-MV-L4t7LGZcQZ1hR9JcW981Ksf9P0L1QxHEd6FlVE7f9LQWAZwq5bCALaKs-Cj-1KkFSoW6hLys-_k6oohwY7YfWotYbo9Q2yHlCfM0X5YLm_uf4Vbg5_JnPJEIXIDhDbtNvkDQb2uvMMEc4Fpz0bmlLZEUJfRhRsV8nhlIuv-MxhNUgi3-AeKP8zBPCaWY8aK3D49enhir5LP3WrOXJ81MBPd9Ux-5F7PPbMIK9uGIuiFGa18bmt-Bpxw3kIGOvmMkYiPezFuOa0TARND4R87LnlOeuVd5cxhnu4jupm9861yxzAmhd19LPyx02ezF1fhcIxSpyQNKxARLSluSHBj4hMORfG59sdG9sZ9a17GrnTRfIXvvim7jNNU85e7a5jI1zjuadxJPAowm6Zg%3D%3D)

| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.

subject: If we win, we can and will stop voter suppression and state legislative thievery attempting to steal the election for Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis or whichever autocrat the Republicans nominate in 2024.
body:
Critical state Supreme Court race
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf18511c5-8e06-44b6-9472-69e8e48baeec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The most important election of the year is in THREE WEEKS_** **_In Wisconsin, there will be a primary for Wisconsin Supreme Court. _This will determine the balance of this court-_ -either a 4-3 right wing majority like its current makeup, or we replace it with a 4-3 progressive majority. The current majority is how the Wisconsin state legislature loses a majority of votes, yet can win two-thirds of state legislative seats. IT'S INSANE_** **_If we win, we can and will stop voter suppression and state legislative thievery attempting to steal the election for Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis or whichever autocrat the Republicans nominate in 2024. If we lose, they will have an opportunity to put away Wisconsin for a democracy-destroying Republican, even if they lack the votes.__ _** [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Supreme Court Judge candidates Protasiewicz and Mitchell, as not only Wisconsin's governance but who wins the presidency in 2024 is at stake._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td38ae0f3-5dd9-4cb4-a68f-c1953622e93b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _With a right winger leaving the Supreme Court, must elect a Democrat to the seat. There is an open primary with two Democrats and two Republicans running, and if we ensure both Democrats run first and second in February, we will guarantee one wins the April general election. At the very least, we must ensure both Republicans don't win February 18th, shutting us out of the general._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d289d11-7486-44a2-9bb3-177c6137656b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Therefore, we must fund both progressive candidates, Dane County Judge Everett Mitchell & Milwaukee County Judge Janet Protasiewicz, __as the secretive, authoritarian Federalist Society dumps cash into Wisconsin to try and win control of this court,** ** just as they did in Ohio and North Carolina in 2022.** We CANNOT allow them to corrupt the court with gobs of money--our democracy may depend on our preventing it.**_ [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Supreme Court Judge candidates Protasiewicz and Mitchell, as not only Wisconsin's governance but who wins the presidency in 2024 is at stake._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f0a3302-adfb-4449-8057-1418883ef827/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for democracy in Wisconsin and America. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb97c5a60-bec9-4206-a02d-5e3e957b2415/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Fellow Democrats,

As the statewide voice for grassroots Illinois Democrats, one of our top priorities is understanding what voters like you care about.

We rely on up-to-date survey data from voters across the state, including urban, rural, and suburban types; everyone from corporate executives to small-town farmers; first-time voters, and those that have been voting for decades.

**[So as a Democratic supporter, we're reaching out in the hopes we can count on you to take a moment and answer our quick survey on your thoughts about top issues for Illinois Democrats to address. Take the survey today to keep our data up-to-date and have your voice heard across Illinois ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/aLTeyWZK_qZzgGmBsIaPBxRLYfg1w-QoqbTjEwbsWto=/g-TGk8kzvI8ipmq0Ya-2o41ghkjv76fmY-FtAALlcZQ=?refcode=EM_PET_Welcome1_TEAM_NTL_4_NG_N_L1)**

Team IDCCA

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Political Charades
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230124-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230124-email]Team,
For the first time in 100 years, the House of Representatives failed to organize on the opening day of the legislative session. While we now have a Speaker of the House, and the first ever Black party leader in Congress, this voting process was a sad display of far-right extremists putting their personal agendas over the people who elected them.
They took it so far that the rounds of voting continued to a level not seen in 100 years. That is unacceptable. Hard stop. I ran for Congress to get things done for North Carolinians and Americans across the country. We need to address inflation, healthcare costs, and the rising costs of housing. That is why I ran for this seat, and I promise to remain focused on these priorities no matter how many political charades far-right extremists intend to play.
Democrats were united in their vote for Hakeem Jeffries as Minority Leader, and we will remain united in making progress on behalf of the people. As we come off of this unfortunate historic display of events, your support is more important now than ever.
Can you chip in $25 or $30 to support my campaign today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230124-email&amount=25]
I look forward to continuing to serve you, your family, your friends, and neighbors in Congress.
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230124-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230124-email]

subject: Even the Democrats don’t believe this.

body:
It’s a disgrace.
It’s a disgrace.

| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztdvtkjl0m750khpouj70hsn3gis96m6r8g45m4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdg60pj6clh2bs)

---
Patriot,

No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election — even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election.

**So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election.** **[We just need to hold the line.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohnqhhckjb06gvu9b0j12tfgflh5r1nhoqfb27g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdg60pj6clh2bs)**

**The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime.**

**[It doesn’t matter who’s against us.

As long as I’m still breathing, I will not stop uncovering the truth.

](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zakac1l4piddr9i50192do9th0rbap6c8c3usjvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdg60pj6clh2bs)** | [**JOIN THE FIGHT!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znuv5t51nn8dktk6q9ol1rocgt8dnhdrh1qpigf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdg60pj6clh2bs)
---

Every day more light is shed on the simple fact that **the Arizona election was RIGGED.** Americans are waking up to this undeniable truth.

Unfortunately — the fact is we’ve got a tight timetable.

**At MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we’re going to be dangerously close to running out of funds. If we lose our cash flow, we lose the ability to fight — that’s the sad reality.**

**_[That’s why I’m reaching out to you — I need a $25 gift as soon as you can spare it.

CAN YOU HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaa5a6rt08v3nsphqa3p6g623e9kr88b1rg07hlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1cdg60pj6clh2bs)_**

name: Team Fetterman
subject: [1 UNREAD] New message from JF
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You've got to see this:
#
Derek,
We wanted to get you this message from John ASAP:
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey Derek, it's John. Here's the deal: our victory means I'm officially in the Senate fighting for you, your family, and families across PA + the country. 😁

But the same right-wing, dark money PACs who spent million$ to try to beat us are ready to see us fail. They're going to spend my *entire* term raising dark $$$ to win this seat back.

I know we can beat them again -- [**but we have to be ready to fight back. So what do you think? Can you make a contribution today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230124-1?refcode=em20230124-1-8222&refcode2=8222_434096_BXaMyI&akid=8222%2E434096%2EBXaMyI) John
We know you get a lot of asks for donations from us, Derek. That's because the strength of the right-wing money machine means we can't afford to take our foot off the fundraising pedal.
**It was with thousands and thousands of normal people chipping in a few bucks at a time that we were able to FLIP PA 🔵 and send John to the U.S. Senate** -- to fight to codify _Roe v. Wade_ , raise the minimum wage, and make the government work for working people again. Grassroots donations from emails like this one make sure that John can continue that important work.
**[So please, chip in any amount to our campaign so we can support John Fetterman's work in 2023 and beyond.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230124-1?refcode=em20230124-1-8222&refcode2=8222_434096_BXaMyI&akid=8222%2E434096%2EBXaMyI)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230124-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230124-8222&refcode2=8222_434096_BXaMyI&akid=8222%2E434096%2EBXaMyI)**
We really mean it when we say it: **_THANK YOU!!_**
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230124-8222-footer&t=1&refcode2=8222_434096_BXaMyI&akid=8222%2E434096%2EBXaMyI)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Something’s not adding up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Let’s talk about billionaire Jeffrey Yass.

Yass has a notorious history of funding Republican election-denying
extremists, evading up to $1 billion in federal taxes, and crediting the
pandemic with his record profits in recent years. He’s set up sham PACs
just to buy candidates off.

This man isn’t just out of touch — he’s downright dangerous. And he gave
the Moderate PAC $1,000,000. The same Moderate PAC that wants to stop
progressive, working-class people from running for office and challenging
the status quo.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230124-27209&t=1001&akid=27209%2E1203867%2EYMGEK_ ]Peter, you and
the rest of our grassroots movement are what’s standing between our
Justice Democrats and the billionaire-funded opposition. Can you chip in
$3 to support us today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230124-27209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27209%2E1203867%2EYMGEK_ ]Contribute $3

This is the trouble with money in politics. Until we elect a progressive
bloc large enough to pass major campaign finance reforms, it’s going to
take all of us coming together to fight off the big money that they will
always send after our candidates.

We have to make sure we can send even more Justice Democrats to Congress
next year — and that means we can’t let the Moderate PAC and their
mega-donors tank our movement.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230124-27209&t=1021&akid=27209%2E1203867%2EYMGEK_ ]They may have billionaires, but we have the people on our side. Your
support means the world to us, and we’re hoping you can go all in with us
today as we prepare for the fights ahead. Can we count on your
$3 donation?

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27209%2E1203867%2EYMGEK_ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27209%2E1203867%2EYMGEK_ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230124-27209-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27209_1203867_YMGEK_&akid=27209%2E1203867%2EYMGEK_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27209%2E1203867%2EYMGEK_

Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Yass has a notorious history of funding Republican election-denying extremists, evading up to $1 billion in federal taxes, and crediting the pandemic with his record profits in recent years. He’s set up sham PACs just to buy candidates off. This man isn’t just out of touch — he’s downright dangerous. And he gave the Moderate PAC $1,000,000. The same Moderate PAC that wants to stop progressive, working-class people from running for office and challenging the status quo. [ ]Peter, you and the rest of our grassroots movement are what’s standing between our Justice Democrats and the billionaire-funded opposition. Can you chip in $3 to support us today? [ ]Contribute $3 This is the trouble with money in politics. Until we elect a progressive bloc large enough to pass major campaign finance reforms, it’s going to take all of us coming together to fight off the big money that they will always send after our candidates. We have to make sure we can send even more Justice Democrats to Congress next year — and that means we can’t let the Moderate PAC and their mega-donors tank our movement. [ ]They may have billionaires, but we have the people on our side. Your support means the world to us, and we’re hoping you can go all in with us today as we prepare for the fights ahead. Can we count on your $3 donation? In solidarity, Team JD Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: Setting PA up for a decade of justice

| Fellow activist, we are writing you today, two days after Roe v. Wade’s 50th anniversary, to tell you change is on its way to Pennsylvania.

We have to do everything we can to make sure it’s positive. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57731180/388957082/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230124SC23_N_TEAM_90DO_5_A_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRjY2JlZGE0LTNhOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jPMkUkoZlxnTHgzCDWDT3OS6XJ6PD9gbMVItF45p5qU=) Last September, PA’s Supreme Court chief justice passed away. This November, Pennsylvanians will make their voices heard on who they want to represent them on the municipal, local and judicial levels including the open seat on the highest court in the Commonwealth. With the overturning of Roe v. Wade last summer, many constituents have already seen the U.S. Supreme Court’s impact on their lives. As NPP’s CEO, Kadida Kenner, states: "We must turn to our own state courts, now transformed into the last line of defense for abortion access and all sorts of other fundamental rights and freedoms, including our freedom to vote." **[This year we are dedicated to fighting back against “off-year” election turnout by continuing our work of voter outreach, civic education, and engagement centering the Commonwealth’s historically disenfranchised and underrepresented communities. This November, Pennsylvanians will make their voices heard on who they want to represent them on the municipal, local and judicial levels including the open seat on the highest court in the Commonwealth. With the overturning of Roe v. Wade last summer, many constituents have already seen the U.S. Supreme Court’s impact on their lives. As NPP’s CEO, Kadida Kenner, states: "We must turn to our own state courts, now transformed into the last line of defense for abortion access and all sorts of other fundamental rights and freedoms, including our freedom to vote." = = Pennsylvania Supreme Court justices have the ability to shape our political landscape for possibly more than a decade to come. With the all-out assault the U.S. Supreme Court is waging against our fundamental freedoms, it is more important than ever that we have a strong state Supreme Court willing to defend them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

Peter, Happy National School Choice Week! We’re celebrating the amazing work being done across the country to provide education choices and opportunities to every student and parent.
Here at the American Federation for Children, we’re hard at work fighting for school choice and delivering real results to families.

| | We know how important it is to empower parents to determine their children’s best educational pathways. We’re doing everything we can to ensure all families have access to quality education. [_**This National School Choice Week, will you join us by pledging $10 to support this critical mission?**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6388059ed744d6986b663ae01e991db&_e=ov3WGRCGdohLXzKzcium2I0timPGWxTNFFeV1DrmNcHDB3fdxM7z4VPhC_rvFtX_y0qhL0xExOvOaZ6TIui7ff-IofJMA8ftHb9fhCgcxGrWUef6pFyWZb5kXb41YJm6hXrecdLkjY01maKTxubfUNzla6-QC8lLylF9G8_wljKEXhSpbJcsdE_dz-1ZB17ZrgEjol24Ucjj0Wop4XfTMOs09gS1U2u2Z6zT-pXDPuyPJr51ug3pg-oP96bb9xaFBprXlVBWlz2aQwszDyjMsnhkUJWC3PkpPFUT_OOIOnKQbzJpQy8f5ecDpeXLJiRf97EH71l-kN1fRonJsKPEjsgLh_lfw19EGKQmFJw103PKtIVlop8C2_FYGnvDKi3YPO7M37jZbM34NeqecnykzGKCnCigCj3k1PeEEP5MpcfgS-8UR51oEpISF1alCFF0) By donating to our cause, you'll be helping us make a difference directly in the lives of children nationwide. Your support will help us continue our advocacy efforts and ensure that all children have access to quality education.

| | [**BRING SCHOOL CHOICE TO EVERY STATE: CHIP IN $10 >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6388059ed744d6986b663ae01e991db&_e=ov3WGRCGdohLXzKzcium2I0timPGWxTNFFeV1DrmNcHDB3fdxM7z4VPhC_rvFtX_y0qhL0xExOvOaZ6TIui7ff-IofJMA8ftHb9fhCgcxGrWUef6pFyWZb5kXb41YJm6hXrecdLkjY01maKTxubfUNzla6-QC8lLylF9G8_wljKEXhSpbJcsdE_dz-1ZB17ZrgEjol24Ucjj0Wop4XfTMOs09gS1U2u2Z6zT-pXDPuyPJr51ug3pg-oP96bb9xaFBprXlVBWlz2aQwszDyjMsnhkUJWC3PkpPFUT_OOIOnLDxrQ3Y_SuvPOgQF9Ub0GUSUqc41MIxuwN-_EfU0MpGXD9dFjrFibyX13HRE1NPY6ltIJAN_kmuxzrYp6mPqL5vwTZTZrNNq0Tn0KG6rJGw8Sf3JzckhEgj7PPf2UYCfMBy8K-MnuCAHMYyIvSQdiC)

| | _Who is the American Federation for Children? _ We’re an organization of parents, activists, and policy professionals all united under one mission: **_bringing school choice to parents and students in every state._ ** We believe EVERY parent deserves a choice, and EVERY child deserves better. **And 72% of Americans agree.** Yet, not every state offers even one alternative to traditional public school. **That’s not fair to students or parents.**

subject: this is a disaster, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
we can’t defend our Democracy without meeting this goal!

| **FIRST:** We told you that Democrats have more than DOUBLE the amount of seats to defend to maintain our Senate majority than Republicans in 2024...
