name: Team Becca
subject: We need student debt relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
The GOP and their special interest backers could kill student debt relief | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57731659/388958371/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjRlZjNkNi0zYTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5U3Y_BDOGnH9BNRnrwNug4Yyes7oJCQ4URePVmYL6M=&emci=ff020e9a-f49b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=664ef3d6-3a9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Last year, President Biden took historic action to address the worsening student debt crisis by canceling up to $20,000 in federal student loans for tens of millions of Americans. _**But the GOP and their special interest backers immediately set out to stop it by filing lawsuits against the White House’s debt relief plan. **_ **The Supreme Court will hear oral arguments for the cases next month, but with Trump’s far-right justices in the majority, the financial security of millions of middle-class Americans is in jeopardy.[Will you take a moment to share with us what $20,000 in student debt relief would mean for you and your family?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57731661/388958373/-810044471?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjRlZjNkNi0zYTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5U3Y_BDOGnH9BNRnrwNug4Yyes7oJCQ4URePVmYL6M=&emci=ff020e9a-f49b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=664ef3d6-3a9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)** **[Share Your Thoughts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57731662/388958375/-810044471?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjRlZjNkNi0zYTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5U3Y_BDOGnH9BNRnrwNug4Yyes7oJCQ4URePVmYL6M=&emci=ff020e9a-f49b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=664ef3d6-3a9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)** As a former public school teacher, Becca knows that there is no greater equalizer in our society than a quality education. But right now, generations of Americans are being punished for their desire to access the opportunities that higher education provides. clean_body: The GOP and their special interest backers could kill student debt relief | | Peter, Last year, President Biden took historic action to address the worsening student debt crisis by canceling up to $20,000 in federal student loans for tens of millions of Americans. But the GOP and their special interest backers immediately set out to stop it by filing lawsuits against the White House’s debt relief plan. The Supreme Court will hear oral arguments for the cases next month, but with Trump’s far-right justices in the majority, the financial security of millions of middle-class Americans is in jeopardy. As a former public school teacher, Becca knows that there is no greater equalizer in our society than a quality education. But right now, generations of Americans are being punished for their desire to access the opportunities that higher education provides. Biden’s unprecedented action to implement mass student debt relief will liberate thousands of Vermonters from back-breaking interest payments and give them a chance to build a strong financial future. We cannot let the Supreme Court take away this critical lifeline. Becca believes that we need to cancel all student debt to give every American a fighting chance at saving, investing, and building a strong financial future for themselves and their families. But she also knows that President Biden’s decision to cancel up to $20,000 in student debt would be a game-changer for folks here in Vermont. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Peter -- House trying to put EPA funding in jeopardy over debt ceiling. This is important:
body:
__[3X MATCH ACTIVE] |
---

|
_**Peter -- attacks on the environment are coming fast this week -- we need to move quickly.**_ Last Thursday, the U.S. government reached its debt ceiling, triggering a manufactured crisis.

We've received word that House Republicans will attempt to leverage negotiations to gut funding for social support programs like Medicare and Social Security, and critical environmental agencies like the EPA and Interior Department. This could threaten the roll-out of climate change measures passed in last year's Inflation Reduction Act. ****_****_

What's more: Republicans have teed up a vote on a new rule that would **_require_ oil leasing on federal lands** in the United States prior to any future sale of oil from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve.

**Peter -- the truth is, we need your help.** Our 2023 Membership Drive is underway, and your support will help us to fund urgent environmental campaigns. Please, [become an LCV member today -- it only costs $5. Right now, a group of donors is triple matching every contribution.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_)

Here's why your contribution is so critical at this very moment, Peter:
* **Because we 're keeping up the pressure to make sure that the commitments made in the Inflation Reduction Act are met.** This includes ensuring that Congress provides the necessary appropriations to federal agencies that will implement the climate, cost-saving, jobs, and health benefits unlocked by the law. [We must see this historic legislation through, and we need your help to make that happen >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_)
* **Because we 're calling on the Biden-Harris administration to exercise its full executive authority to protect the environment, our health, and the climate. **In doing so, the administration can stop future drilling on public lands, force dirty power plants to clean up, ensure more cars and trucks are electric, and accelerate deployment of clean renewable energy sources. But that's only going to happen if the environmental movement organizes and speaks out. [Power our response: pitch in to protect public lands >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_)
* **Because we 're pushing for confirmation of key executive branch vacancies. **Agencies such as the EPA and Federal Energy Regulatory Commission protect the environment and public health, deliver environmental justice, and advance clean renewable energy and climate action: [This is how we get climate action done, but we need support from the environmental movement to back us >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_)
* **Because your membership goes three times further right now.** A group of donors is triple matching every contribution through the end of the month. Your support will make triple the impact to ensure that we can accomplish all of our congressional priorities for this year: from implementing the historic pro-climate investments from the Inflation Reduction Act to supporting the environmental justice movement.****[Donate now and your contribution will go even further >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_)
* **Because membership is only $5 right now.** Environmental justice issues impact every single one of us: everyone deserves access to clean air, clean water, and a safe climate protected by a just and equitable democracy. [Help us build a sustainable future: any amount will help >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_)

Help make sure we win this fight -- right now -- and for generations to come. [Claim your LCV membership today -- even just $5 helps -- and a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD_)

We know we can do this with you by our side -- thank you.

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
|

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9123227&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDU2NDUyNwS2&spReportId=MTY2MDU2NDUyNwS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9123227&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDU2NDUyNwS2&spReportId=MTY2MDU2NDUyNwS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW_) |

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Will you add your name and personally endorse Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s a small and simple action, but it speaks volumes about the grassroots support for our campaign.
#

Peter -
As you read this email, thousands and thousands of people are responding to an important question:
[**Can Ruben Gallego count on your personal endorsement in his campaign for United States Senate in Arizona?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230124_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230124-2-15&refcode2=277.734936.pWytaX&t=1&akid=277%2E734936%2EpWytaX)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230124_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230124-2-15&refcode2=277.734936.pWytaX&t=2&akid=277%2E734936%2EpWytaX)
Kyrsten Sinema no doubt has the support of the hedge funds, pharmaceutical companies, and probably of her friend Mitch McConnell, as well.
She’ll raise boatloads of money from the powerful people she has prioritized protecting in the Senate.
But our advantages are different. Our advantage is the amount of people who support this campaign for change.
So today we want to ask you to add your name as a personal endorser of Ruben’s campaign for Senate.
It’s a small and simple action, but it speaks volumes about the grassroots support for our campaign.
What do you say?
[**Please use this link to add your name and say you endorse Ruben Gallego’s campaign for United States Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230124_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230124-2-15&refcode2=277.734936.pWytaX&t=3&akid=277%2E734936%2EpWytaX)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230124_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230124-2-15&refcode2=277.734936.pWytaX&t=4&akid=277%2E734936%2EpWytaX)
It’ll be great for Ruben to see your name on the list of endorsers. Thank you in advance for saying you’re in.
Ruben Gallego For Arizona
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230124_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230124-2-15&refcode2=277.734936.pWytaX&t=5&akid=277%2E734936%2EpWytaX)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=277%2E734936%2EpWytaX). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Congress, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=277_734936_pWytaX&akid=277%2E734936%2EpWytaX)

She’ll raise boatloads of money from the powerful people she has prioritized protecting in the Senate. But our advantages are different. Our advantage is the amount of people who support this campaign for change. So today we want to ask you to add your name as a personal endorser of Ruben’s campaign for Senate. It’s a small and simple action, but it speaks volumes about the grassroots support for our campaign. What do you say? It’ll be great for Ruben to see your name on the list of endorsers. Thank you in advance for saying you’re in. Ruben Gallego For Arizona Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

body:

#
Hey there, Peter! My name is Lexie, and I'm the new finance director here at Team Baldwin! My job is to make sure we’re raising what we need to prepare for the tough election cycle ahead and send Tammy back to the Senate. November 5, 2024 (that’s Election Day next year!) might seem far away, but it will be here before we know it — and if Tammy’s race is anything like last year’s Senate campaigns, it’s going to get expensive _fast_. In fact, Senate Republicans have already launched their first attack ads of the year, and we’re sure it won’t be long before they start spending big to beat Tammy. Mitch McConnell and his GOP super PAC megadonors spent a fortune in Wisconsin last year, so we need to start our fundraising operation early. Truth be told, I’m starting out my job in a tricky spot — January has been slow for fundraising, and we have some catching up to do. But I’m hoping that I can count on this amazing grassroots team to help out while we’re in a bit of a pinch! **As I settle into this role, I’m hoping you can help me start off strong by pitching in $5 or more towards our end-of-month deadline. name: Team AOC
subject: Corporations should pay their fair share.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Corporations drove inflation. They need to pay taxes.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230124-3825-header&t=1&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)
The GOP is trying to claw back money that the Inflation Reduction Act currently allocates to improve the IRS. Since the GOP began regularly defunding the IRS in 2010, audits of corporations have fallen by over 50%.1
**In 2021, corporate pricing of gas and everyday goods accounted for more than 50% of inflation** 2 — all while huge corporate monopolies reported their highest profit margins in 70 years.
Our system is not working for working people.
**Alexandria has been very clear: multi-billion dollar corporations need to pay their fair share in taxes. And she can call out big pharma, tech, and fossil fuel executives for scamming the public because she doesn’t take a dime of their corporate money.** [If you’re able, can you donate $3 today to support Alexandria’s fight for an economy that works for all of us?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230124._tmZap&refcode=em20230124-3825-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230124._tmZap&refcode=em20230124-3825-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)**
This year, the IRS has already used funds from the Inflation Reduction Act, which grants $80 billion over the next 10 years, to begin modernizing its technology and increase customer service personnel. Audits will not increase for taxpayers making under $400,000, but **the agency is hoping to go after the estimated $163 billion per year that the top 1% avoids paying.** 3
Rather than taxing corporations or the ultra wealthy, extremist House Republicans are now pushing a proposal to impose a 30% national sales tax — eliminating corporate taxes and the IRS altogether.
[This is not economic justice. But we can fight back by keeping leaders like Alexandria in Congress who will lead the charge against corporations, and help her bring other progressive leaders into the fight. Can you donate $3 to help us do just that this year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230124._tmZap&refcode=em20230124-3825-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [Washington Post](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16203?t=23&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)
2 - [Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16204?t=24&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)
3 - [ABC News](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16205?t=25&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230124?refcode=em20230124-3825-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=26&refcode2=3825_2526796_BEBpeV&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230124-3825-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=27&akid=3825%2E2526796%2EBEBpeV)**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Trump announcement BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I’m stunned. I just learned that Trump has raised a horrifying $500 MILLION since his MASSIVE election loss — all to endanger our country again. I hate to alarm you, but this is the kind of cash that could buy Donald Trump the Presidency – and help him destroy our Democracy in the process. I’ll fight tooth and nail to ensure this election-denying extremist and his cronies NEVER set foot in the halls of power again. body:
It's devastating for rural communities | | | Hi Peter – **Rural America is witnessing a healthcare crisis that is devastating local communities.** An uptick of hospital closures, shortage of primary care providers, and challenges with affordable and accessible care options are endangering the lives of millions of Americans. **Democrats in rural areas have long advocated for increased healthcare options, resources, training programs, and accountability.** Republicans, on the other hand, have often put a stop to this policy progress, advocating against women's healthcare, Medicaid and Medicare, and other healthcare programs. **United Rural Democrats has been fighting the rural healthcare crisis from the ground up** – listening to local communities, putting together grassroots coalitions, and working to elect Democratic leaders who will put healthcare reform at the top of the political agenda. ****[**Democrats in rural America are fighting against Republicans who are in the pockets of Big Pharma. Unlike them, we are 100% people-powered and not funded by special interests. clean_body: It's devastating for rural communities | | | Hi Peter – Rural America is witnessing a healthcare crisis that is devastating local communities. An uptick of hospital closures, shortage of primary care providers, and challenges with affordable and accessible care options are endangering the lives of millions of Americans. Democrats in rural areas have long advocated for increased healthcare options, resources, training programs, and accountability. Republicans, on the other hand, have often put a stop to this policy progress, advocating against women's healthcare, Medicaid and Medicare, and other healthcare programs. United Rural Democrats has been fighting the rural healthcare crisis from the ground up – listening to local communities, putting together grassroots coalitions, and working to elect Democratic leaders who will put healthcare reform at the top of the political agenda. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you for all of your support. – United Rural Democrats HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: urgent poll for top Democrats (via VPP)
subject: Do you support the Congressional stock trading ban?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Please respond before 11:59 PM tonight.
| | **BREAKING: Lawmakers renew bipartisan push to ban congressional stock trading**
---
Due to this update, we’re conducting an urgent poll for top Democrats:
[**Do you support the Congressional stock trading ban?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
---
[NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
*** PLEASE RESPOND BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT OR YOUR ANSWER WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE MARKED “NO.” ***
* * *
Listen, Americans’ trust in their lawmakers has been SHATTERED.

In 2020, Republicans like David Perdue sold off hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of stock after a briefing alerted them that the stock market could take a hit due to the severity of the pandemic.

_Elected officials must rebuild the trust that has been lost._

The TRUST in Congress Act would require members of Congress and close family to put certain investments into a qualified blind trust while the member is in office.

**This bill is a step in the right direction – but before we make any decisions, we must know what top Democrats think:**
[**Do you support the Congressional stock trading ban?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=11&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
---
[NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=12&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-trust-act/?source=VPP_20230124_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=13&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj)
*** PLEASE RESPOND BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT OR YOUR ANSWER WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE MARKED “NO.” ***
Thank you,

_VPP_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6098%2E878179%2E7Z6etj).**

---
| The Senate is expected to vote later this week on SF 001, which would:
* Allow 13-year-olds to get abortions without their parents ever knowing
* Make it easy for sexual predators to force their victims to get abortions
* Force taxpayers to fund abortions
* Allow women to receive abortions from physicians without licenses
* Make it easier for women coming from out of state to receive late-term abortions
* And so much more

**Please take a moment to contact your State Senator today and urge him or her to vote NO on this dangerous legislation!**

You can click on the Senators' names below to send them an email and use the phone numbers next to their names to call. A simple, "please vote NO on SF 001" will suffice!

You can learn more about this dangerous piece of legislation in the video below. Thank you for taking action today!

Want to know why we are asking you for just $1? A few reasons:
* We’re only 1 week away from our 1st end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year.

* Starting the year strong when Democrats are up against a tough Senate map — and Martin’s seat in New Mexico is up for re-election — is critical. The earlier donations come in, the more prepared we will be to get out the vote, launch ads, and connect with New Mexicans about what matters to them most.

* Contributions of just $1 at a time may seem small, but when you add up donations from folks across New Mexico and around the country, it makes a powerful impact.

[**If we convinced you, please chip in $1 right now to help us reach our end-of-month goal and stay on track in our fundraising:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57741229/388963484/1676867679?amount=1&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230124_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVmZWFlNi00MjljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RgvYcmjq3cblV7qqoI1kdP0L89CpNXveOFXmBcRIlrE=)

Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65314af85a83439fbf3d647ed6a609c8&_e=MKFuLhQNXfs2TTvsS4BPoXizjH4OekvOlIa11hCNEmtNccs5s_XLVtkibOY-jHl0FF75ag4OhPaC0x59evU27OzThIfMelEVKHKlrGVgKdmujcoi2gbzwimMmOAnDvExwRousyCZ-2CAJzC0q7Hq60creLWOF3S6nbPI1_laKfilpIgyyqsckCG06SDc9RX5q_sF0kW3dreYo4wVC1lN0hwqVZQy02zkbE9-9mjIKJwd3PoE310ZIuD3hBHW3jp2r-Dbxv_1IRtWMXrUb6s4W216NXODzLqGic0bYf9XAfE%3D)

[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65314af85a83439fbf3d647ed6a609c8&_e=MKFuLhQNXfs2TTvsS4BPoXizjH4OekvOlIa11hCNEmtNccs5s_XLVtkibOY-jHl0FF75ag4OhPaC0x59evU27OzThIfMelEVKHKlrGVgKdmujcoi2gbzwimMmOAnDvExwRousyCZ-2CAJzC0q7Hq62suxkOflLFT8NrADeYOslIjk8iorxyv_NuHnjW9CweePKBNgW5ujmGcDmW-IFWMJDoA2bRUEib7E4vKG-fbydkwdPfd_gEpzjcU-1qIpEpVVo0QG1kdjBMd12-XsZD_-DgdW6L3lXSIPH65Hhvk0pk%3D)

[Get my book](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65314af85a83439fbf3d647ed6a609c8&_e=MKFuLhQNXfs2TTvsS4BPoXizjH4OekvOlIa11hCNEmtNccs5s_XLVtkibOY-jHl0FF75ag4OhPaC0x59evU27OzThIfMelEVKHKlrGVgKdmujcoi2gbzwimMmOAnDvExwRousyCZ-2CAJzC0q7Hq64FI6gCzNpnDafWMWn42oJljlux8sgXKxELqspC1MfbayJn5p-EEsAvRvuKhHDBb_1ijVQnQ9NTwfDclpK718hIg98m9cU7mkVFBdg2eaFx9FSvgeIaT-53OTreEr8LpVR5p-pZ_PeMgZ1_P8ITQ7Qc%3D)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65314af85a83439fbf3d647ed6a609c8&_e=MKFuLhQNXfs2TTvsS4BPoXizjH4OekvOlIa11hCNEmtNccs5s_XLVtkibOY-jHl0FF75ag4OhPaC0x59evU27OzThIfMelEVKHKlrGVgKdmujcoi2gbzwimMmOAnDvExwRousyCZ-2CAJzC0q7Hq69Zn1VrHtQ5N9oud5xrTUIHyw5DdpV4oeF2Gns-h0vqS4M5d5QAjsftf6sreH5BIQh1vxyJc2NRxAxGuajFl4REK9eHiaemHBqb4asv3EJ4_9LnoPhGn3h_0e-fmnQaV6ZIljKeSusaCP0IuzKNg1BE%3D) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65314af85a83439fbf3d647ed6a609c8&_e=MKFuLhQNXfs2TTvsS4BPoXizjH4OekvOlIa11hCNEmtNccs5s_XLVtkibOY-jHl0FF75ag4OhPaC0x59evU27OzThIfMelEVKHKlrGVgKdmujcoi2gbzwimMmOAnDvExwRousyCZ-2CAJzC0q7Hq68sKjh14xJ9VUqEz99UdnUOoSzFl_YKEulhXn5XIIgRu20OMJ_d1AcY21o2-xGrAP1wKmtQuIJazBydtvIJ72MFj16tak5oDpXmMi9ZjU94GcaRr2nYFDbuI9ROH8bHVV-nPNJm_8Th6vMwdssZ-egk%3D)
---
[Get my book](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65314af85a83439fbf3d647ed6a609c8&_e=MKFuLhQNXfs2TTvsS4BPoXizjH4OekvOlIa11hCNEmtNccs5s_XLVtkibOY-jHl0FF75ag4OhPaC0x59evU27OzThIfMelEVKHKlrGVgKdmujcoi2gbzwimMmOAnDvExwRousyCZ-2CAJzC0q7Hq6w6E4CuTT99gPm97r3hSpl1UTaPiC1iBb_JwfweVNBD2o-CVRoqUIaZvd7OkuyQDKh2vqXU4cBaiwnUsWQVft8VH5z8CdtIRe7ubB-oEe4QgQ_gEkqWM6iItG6dXnzcwT6xEmHUMDpdL_j6Jp0WKO4c%3D)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65314af85a83439fbf3d647ed6a609c8&_e=MKFuLhQNXfs2TTvsS4BPoXizjH4OekvOlIa11hCNEmtNccs5s_XLVtkibOY-jHl0FF75ag4OhPaC0x59evU27OzThIfMelEVKHKlrGVgKdmujcoi2gbzwimMmOAnDvExwRousyCZ-2CAJzC0q7Hq6-VxDIEpJqDfgrp2mJq8aHH0DWA_v8f3cBYIc-ewKZl7bxMuMlyI9O8l6ckBULPHDNI2w9dasZ55ZGl9dMVgiFDO3mL4aDjlTm6LMRjJ5J0bh7XCOrK5R3xohypB8VBB2j0iAezRKmzg_FBL03bPmwg%3D)

---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f8eda57b885499b90a9b0ccd02ea660&_e=XajedxBb08nACORKj5luAhCtsvBjwwTYf8wghpgG-ZC9iLoKgdkJOY4FYj_PDvmesr01kuljUUd6_vwbSRjeYHsV6bpfE9G71hYrx329O7ZFmLy2FN7ozQve4XpiieZnTA5AdVmT6rodt3x1yubL0oFFjeMsWJ_3Rhh7FvhockDwCF4GMRkB-AO17rlHOKazOacJOM9_qqg0WoND3pkEgLKy5AFWUPeD2PtQ0NcCC9pGaLX_9DNzdAuoqTTz2waP_eSl7w8z9hdfpwfBPN9rv_R1F6FUFbK819eH7ezuRbp7I7g0tkDoc9j3W8rWI9YX) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f8eda57b885499b90a9b0ccd02ea660&_e=XajedxBb08nACORKj5luAhCtsvBjwwTYf8wghpgG-ZC9iLoKgdkJOY4FYj_PDvmesr01kuljUUd6_vwbSRjeYHsV6bpfE9G71hYrx329O7ZFmLy2FN7ozQve4XpiieZnTA5AdVmT6rodt3x1yubL0kjsDQhDFE8CNBw8Jys-QbO1i_4nfNvaAMp-N49G7AGrv5U9URzkRbZWZWNCqedOGsgwSyB4SvnszCgzki10QPqrOnqHEi2mfk0spfJUhus59JZXwZURs4RdqXvwwrEQkOLsVqeoWeW6pQz2J8UU3CsbH3QDdBpLPg38FepHIn8q)
---
[Get my book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f8eda57b885499b90a9b0ccd02ea660&_e=XajedxBb08nACORKj5luAhCtsvBjwwTYf8wghpgG-ZC9iLoKgdkJOY4FYj_PDvmesr01kuljUUd6_vwbSRjeYHsV6bpfE9G71hYrx329O7ZFmLy2FN7ozQve4XpiieZnTA5AdVmT6rodt3x1yubL0gUKHl8CpAKLKKyXTfK85mznVghW0LhRHpmkLYB84LbAEGQZ1GaCyIkdjV7arzKFLVQzZGyifWarBUzZykG317KIIa7Xp39putK80_7UW9x5vuoBG21zOEFnsS86U1xKSckJg4D34UtmDrM9rbL3Qb1-BUWfALtBHNcJKncroNF0)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f8eda57b885499b90a9b0ccd02ea660&_e=XajedxBb08nACORKj5luAhCtsvBjwwTYf8wghpgG-ZC9iLoKgdkJOY4FYj_PDvmesr01kuljUUd6_vwbSRjeYHsV6bpfE9G71hYrx329O7ZFmLy2FN7ozQve4XpiieZnTA5AdVmT6rodt3x1yubL0gR5m7ckpGcqGyXugbBSO1CICFT8jiRX-EtpruV0pPCU32IL2q4gAaoLRtR19nq5ruT9xDfnlBgSJIGOvnyVqofdO7nm_MBPlBufD9IGl0I35xEKV8wDp0-NIS3hi4-A11u_rC_ozrbnDQpYD5N17eiGy-SHGwFdnVY4oPM8oJPs)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The American response to the Great Reset
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2141dc479d47aa968463405fcc99e2&_e=kycOwxRh2-hImEIJERz7YwEQujCBH88Qvqt6ZXFfOfnkK0nLYeU2VuShWM8CiGx1iWBPmp4dNXDYDUaH_kMbulORRWwz-EKJyrFCo2JG5TlXxCfKHFQk6xY9lLbWZtI1sWbB9MrU-Lod_IkqOsYUhNRTsjDf3-piScRHdOuUM85wwoGI_1K1Lab0PnLRvIXNlqkGwlw8xywepI8ytz-UwubCEDTE8eHJfSfC-Dh80yDVQrroJ4pE2m75NeWTd4xdTTDOIP5OCvH6-Z6STmNIwkHOH_MuD_NO0ngfJ8saZpw%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2141dc479d47aa968463405fcc99e2&_e=kycOwxRh2-hImEIJERz7YwEQujCBH88Qvqt6ZXFfOfnkK0nLYeU2VuShWM8CiGx1iWBPmp4dNXDYDUaH_kMbulORRWwz-EKJyrFCo2JG5TlXxCfKHFQk6xY9lLbWZtI1sWbB9MrU-Lod_IkqOsYUhM4PH2TZ9ArfhtpgL0qctCHGTU-wpjmFBsGrGjuFfyq-cru_Ffx4eCzTaUCrimVnms61MdZQG7G2BmEw7mypvS-JvE0fe_WusbFeWQ08rr9ys8hA8cC97pzIXKAl3X2lKfKj-7GmuTBMBT8z-CmsCQ0%3D)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2141dc479d47aa968463405fcc99e2&_e=kycOwxRh2-hImEIJERz7YwEQujCBH88Qvqt6ZXFfOfnkK0nLYeU2VuShWM8CiGx1iWBPmp4dNXDYDUaH_kMbulORRWwz-EKJyrFCo2JG5TlXxCfKHFQk6xY9lLbWZtI1sWbB9MrU-Lod_IkqOsYUhBZCNT0iFXeeNnP-nvz6sIsBjYllBd_qCee-c98dgoUU26H4htwOCOtS03G7RRyil94AiSJSqA4Hq2zJs2Ucj_fdRyONHAK3cDDY5ZDXkHIVGG7MoHN3wSkvms7pkw_mcDWCwIrR4Rvfx2L1mR9t7eI%3D)
---
[Get your book now](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2141dc479d47aa968463405fcc99e2&_e=kycOwxRh2-hImEIJERz7YwEQujCBH88Qvqt6ZXFfOfnkK0nLYeU2VuShWM8CiGx1iWBPmp4dNXDYDUaH_kMbulORRWwz-EKJyrFCo2JG5TlXxCfKHFQk6xY9lLbWZtI1sWbB9MrU-Lod_IkqOsYUhHWHGRLGirqzaEWS16I67iA_aRiClz7mQuXwkUSu7H1-YhqJaPnNZmOqOcE0-NmLjl7H0a7L6AMRgfo9zB95vVmarVPlwLSMkeOSUgv5QQwDM-fRN6J44dtvDdZVNLQnblUGUvmhC93dpRTOF9dYx_U%3D)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2141dc479d47aa968463405fcc99e2&_e=kycOwxRh2-hImEIJERz7YwEQujCBH88Qvqt6ZXFfOfnkK0nLYeU2VuShWM8CiGx1iWBPmp4dNXDYDUaH_kMbulORRWwz-EKJyrFCo2JG5TlXxCfKHFQk6xY9lLbWZtI1sWbB9MrU-Lod_IkqOsYUhO9pK2oLExwZXLRje-RzuKKyzLcpKBuD26F3arATYJfdxgA0JIeCcoeHF50s9A8N8J82uePhuRS7oBryu1VhP8mCPoYXfZik5Oku9xEQ7rCv4-swDeghT8wr_jnUIPZMzdLnuzebUkeNtvZsLqiVVtU%3D)
---
[Get your book now](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2141dc479d47aa968463405fcc99e2&_e=kycOwxRh2-hImEIJERz7YwEQujCBH88Qvqt6ZXFfOfnkK0nLYeU2VuShWM8CiGx1iWBPmp4dNXDYDUaH_kMbulORRWwz-EKJyrFCo2JG5TlXxCfKHFQk6xY9lLbWZtI1sWbB9MrU-Lod_IkqOsYUhPTqz68Sd64K90NHfJhWGmD1dlkoBRiL8wkdpyGIDyYrmwHL9846oF8AjI6uSEugS6zQPyUi2mTwxIeYIE11-bRxJNeC0AENZd4ibzRP8Z4bOp5t31fNtt6NS4ZRR-joMuZcqBEErTWK7cjfMwCyRY4%3D)
---
Whether you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before, or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just five dollars.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b2141dc479d47aa968463405fcc99e2&_e=kycOwxRh2-hImEIJERz7YwEQujCBH88Qvqt6ZXFfOfnkK0nLYeU2VuShWM8CiGx1iWBPmp4dNXDYDUaH_kMbulORRWwz-EKJyrFCo2JG5TlXxCfKHFQk6xY9lLbWZtI1sWbB9MrU-Lod_IkqOsYUhOy1CG82SwFVj5HFSS52E4-vjVv4QWYrKbUFkVwiJjfS3xlsrC4hzuFe1GDtWVfLUuBs-8cAPNKM3H8I-r-DQJBLh4Io2jdTcDRJ_fu8i95oVaEH_QEisOIKlHJBCvFp1i1glgIYMFTJsjuNs9823gg%3D) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9f3a9dd5a1f49d5997f40dd1b206429&_e=CYlsWgQiIMd9egQ_vBpW1cqYWsbnEvie_GKss9tK3gMsFTsPJGEHmn9wnleBWJkTvR1xvA1rh4fU8ZKHaC5sGlgNX4-CjkOd6Gv6CX-hD0UXLUSK0ehpgaXmlznzhQr8qq_LaDNw5GAj7EhZGeggTbPlz1HkhM4cyDoO_T0pplXYCDqquIUCQZusMfoCDA8CWtk2iwKGFZ2M5XJTOIsIUoUHq5e2eFRcj8wcFO9DJafZK1e_AO1ZUb3wS1qE2Rx1AEVR5PDa7IfFmhmENk91z1siloDxly9A4tJgPR4OO6QZ6kRlxzohNtwag3gKfSmSvMXtlFiGNTdBjW_Gu0CmaPr03L8t-lqJSk1f22aZ2J8gj2Itxwf4ai2KXiXwAZl_rY3JxZyMb6Cm5rp0794RlA%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9f3a9dd5a1f49d5997f40dd1b206429&_e=CYlsWgQiIMd9egQ_vBpW1cqYWsbnEvie_GKss9tK3gMsFTsPJGEHmn9wnleBWJkTvR1xvA1rh4fU8ZKHaC5sGlgNX4-CjkOd6Gv6CX-hD0UXLUSK0ehpgaXmlznzhQr8qq_LaDNw5GAj7EhZGeggTbPlz1HkhM4cyDoO_T0pplXYCDqquIUCQZusMfoCDA8CWtk2iwKGFZ2M5XJTOIsIUoUHq5e2eFRcj8wcFO9DJafZK1e_AO1ZUb3wS1qE2Rx10cQ6XuWKcpQWrzVugvuzRB_Xvcj1h3mvrXiIxD4j-NomEpJj1AntdRyn-H78lwsovAup4bGg8HKlbLZdRDoI6nGJ_CuxhPVGIVlwDdqiaWVj52zbS568TKWaubqLjMo42Cxd-mnR9rgvI988IOHc2w%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9f3a9dd5a1f49d5997f40dd1b206429&_e=CYlsWgQiIMd9egQ_vBpW1cqYWsbnEvie_GKss9tK3gMsFTsPJGEHmn9wnleBWJkTvR1xvA1rh4fU8ZKHaC5sGlgNX4-CjkOd6Gv6CX-hD0UXLUSK0ehpgaXmlznzhQr8qq_LaDNw5GAj7EhZGeggTbPlz1HkhM4cyDoO_T0pplXYCDqquIUCQZusMfoCDA8CWtk2iwKGFZ2M5XJTOIsIUoUHq5e2eFRcj8wcFO9DJafZK1e_AO1ZUb3wS1qE2Rx1oKikq9M2ZDZKD6M6YfRXnNB4seFxoj07_1Qu937MlanQKp9Ei_sp0WEXnWGqIzw0KtqQ_EGg8POCKZvabyt2tpCOoWshPbY_gyX57Kn5ph8_XMpjpzWHXg8jp6TMrvbLH8Ozbsy66qVAvMHjQAB0nw%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9f3a9dd5a1f49d5997f40dd1b206429&_e=CYlsWgQiIMd9egQ_vBpW1cqYWsbnEvie_GKss9tK3gMsFTsPJGEHmn9wnleBWJkTvR1xvA1rh4fU8ZKHaC5sGlgNX4-CjkOd6Gv6CX-hD0UXLUSK0ehpgaXmlznzhQr8qq_LaDNw5GAj7EhZGeggTbPlz1HkhM4cyDoO_T0pplXYCDqquIUCQZusMfoCDA8CWtk2iwKGFZ2M5XJTOIsIUoUHq5e2eFRcj8wcFO9DJafZK1e_AO1ZUb3wS1qE2Rx1cSCjFTs1LAzHlf7zCUd6pteN-yidBz2u7xOs79fv2xG74doVItNRkejei4AHF7NfZSGQD9V-AgK5MCm_LTaWYEHc6AyUHTL6eFbgR1-Y0UumBc5n5-dPT-eGcpb4AFgGQIocyEAJCYCuJnbVunJNOw%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9f3a9dd5a1f49d5997f40dd1b206429&_e=CYlsWgQiIMd9egQ_vBpW1cqYWsbnEvie_GKss9tK3gMsFTsPJGEHmn9wnleBWJkTvR1xvA1rh4fU8ZKHaC5sGlgNX4-CjkOd6Gv6CX-hD0UXLUSK0ehpgaXmlznzhQr8qq_LaDNw5GAj7EhZGeggTbPlz1HkhM4cyDoO_T0pplXYCDqquIUCQZusMfoCDA8CWtk2iwKGFZ2M5XJTOIsIUoUHq5e2eFRcj8wcFO9DJafZK1e_AO1ZUb3wS1qE2Rx113hzmn1cbvOyyq4OOdhRK5aneigeqUVEpMe4l1uuRx0FauDaoIpnpG0_7ZWJGNuuEmHskcwokfUFxM7lTx4TSHSeX6t3c_aqkqEZP4Obclnu7OkpAwOmnF9MT_Sq2kLRvZW1oONRSeeEE0Jnfcq1Lg%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9f3a9dd5a1f49d5997f40dd1b206429&_e=CYlsWgQiIMd9egQ_vBpW1cqYWsbnEvie_GKss9tK3gMsFTsPJGEHmn9wnleBWJkTvR1xvA1rh4fU8ZKHaC5sGlgNX4-CjkOd6Gv6CX-hD0UXLUSK0ehpgaXmlznzhQr8qq_LaDNw5GAj7EhZGeggTbPlz1HkhM4cyDoO_T0pplXYCDqquIUCQZusMfoCDA8CWtk2iwKGFZ2M5XJTOIsIUoUHq5e2eFRcj8wcFO9DJafZK1e_AO1ZUb3wS1qE2Rx1vsQp-kQIWjof6txE_vWNyDb7N22asu8G9JZ1dYWFO9qdKKEbz3QEHYZPOalB8-F8hq8LCrCyNimNvrNpbzTyEyo6INZMCxYD9SWnBsuYJDy-tBoQNVBQ1YLRzTsMjR7z2mcEbuC3q7qljFqjvTUs6A%3D%3D)

This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?" _I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1f40d03ecb34ba19daca7cb3a56a2f0&_e=l-IAZzUQOHM1L7ScqiGbxOZ4is9vQ6hAxWXOz0YNUVBpmdYyAsbUyq1IeprIWhQ4MArR-jBSOq_tlAj_wPcaDb8xitKOYChhHRtDhzgAUbqsk9HNAbR5fGQzQ8t3b-yoeg-1KLtq10XpNp-T78KOn80wDiCNzxveFeRSnXpImXVsU4-wUojM387UPXrYTvGPgYB4bdhFOBJSqkonQsrSMo9CZhUO9q92cAudZ5Vhoi8fdQ2AUghTnTKN-S059mTRi1kSfZzig_AIQE-LRni6AGznp8YOcVXDt2PYfoLhLOE%3D)

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1f40d03ecb34ba19daca7cb3a56a2f0&_e=l-IAZzUQOHM1L7ScqiGbxOZ4is9vQ6hAxWXOz0YNUVBpmdYyAsbUyq1IeprIWhQ4MArR-jBSOq_tlAj_wPcaDb8xitKOYChhHRtDhzgAUbqsk9HNAbR5fGQzQ8t3b-yoeg-1KLtq10XpNp-T78KOn_oubWhioiZRwX5BB6Ijn7zT7Zz2441fxBetlgDV4wpM3yjlx1McvH7bFGaIXJ_wyLjzDTOUrUfBl-I2g5-0abb_y4AiV-EIwo34ZJ_KaZEnzmNa-DqBrchcrd6W7u9fmxNBAi5ZaASkSFMx-HKMXLk%3D)

* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. name: DemocratsServe.org
subject: 50 years after Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57722439/388933908/390144955?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230124_1_1&refcode2=3e298ffd-1d9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&contactdata=z3J2986S8nXdIyp1UaqcL4P9O7YYVND4qsVV/GL93/vQWn/dhDkCHMnhIP/rQUYHvU6CHOUlAFHstLC6deNb8Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMjk4ZmZkLTFkOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vGLYbNm2rDswpxKBmR2MSTyHOh3PEA9Y7O4qMPWQD6U=)

Peter,

This week in 1973, the Supreme Court affirmed the constitutional right to abortion in _Roe v. Wade_.

But now, 50 years later, abortion rights have been gutted at the highest court in the land. Millions of Americans now live in states with abortion bans or extreme restrictions.

It’s on all of us to fight back.

Democrats with public service backgrounds understand the profound impact that access to reproductive healthcare can have in a community. **We’re building a pro-choice majority that will fight for abortion access – and we need you to join us.**

[Will you sign on and commit to voting for pro-choice candidates up and down the ballot?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57722440/388933909/-1839575787?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230124_1_1&refcode2=3e298ffd-1d9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&contactdata=z3J2986S8nXdIyp1UaqcL4P9O7YYVND4qsVV/GL93/vQWn/dhDkCHMnhIP/rQUYHvU6CHOUlAFHstLC6deNb8Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMjk4ZmZkLTFkOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vGLYbNm2rDswpxKBmR2MSTyHOh3PEA9Y7O4qMPWQD6U=&emci=bbc133a9-119c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3e298ffd-1d9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)

One of Democrats Serve’s most important victories in the fight for reproductive freedom in the 2022 election was helping to elect Katie Hobbs as Governor of Arizona, defeating the staunchly anti-choice Kari Lake. We know that as a former social worker, Katie will fight tooth and nail to ensure safe, legal access to reproductive health care in Arizona.

[From Governors’ mansions to the halls of Congress to state and local legislators – Democrats Serve is committed to supporting candidates who will protect our constitutional rights. Will you sign on to join us? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57722442/388933911/-1839575787?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230124_1_1&refcode2=3e298ffd-1d9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&contactdata=z3J2986S8nXdIyp1UaqcL4P9O7YYVND4qsVV/GL93/vQWn/dhDkCHMnhIP/rQUYHvU6CHOUlAFHstLC6deNb8Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMjk4ZmZkLTFkOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vGLYbNm2rDswpxKBmR2MSTyHOh3PEA9Y7O4qMPWQD6U=&emci=bbc133a9-119c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=3e298ffd-1d9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: When will it end?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
My heart goes out to the victims of the tragedy at Half Moon Bay
#

Friends -
Yet another senseless act of gun violence occurred in the state of California less than 48 hours after a gunman murdered 11 people in Monterey Park.
At least 7 people in Half Moon Bay died last night after a gunman opened fire at two separate locations in the community.
When will this end?
We’ve seen tragedy after tragedy, yet too many lawmakers refuse to acknowledge our national gun violence crisis—or take action to address it.
The status quo is unacceptable. Workplace violence. Domestic violence. Community violence. Hate-fueled violence.
Is this the country we want to be? Are we willing to let certain lawmakers block commonsense, lifesaving action because they care more about NRA campaign contributions than American lives?
For me, the answer is a resounding NO. I refuse to accept these deadly tragedies as normal, or as an unavoidable cost we must bear. And I refuse to accept inaction as an answer.
My heart goes out to the victims of this senseless tragedy. No community should have to experience the pain and trauma that comes from gun violence.
We must continue to fight. We must demand that our leaders take action to protect every American from preventable bloodshed.
\- Gabby Giffords

* * *
**Giffords PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to Giffords PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230124-1-15&t=1&akid=4139%2E3935704%2EzBPVG3)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4139%2E3935704%2EzBPVG3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tim=20Baxter?=
subject: It's time to get to work, Peter!
body:
I believe that, as citizens of New Hampshire, it's important for us to be informed about candidates running for office who will uphold these... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/04a68bd6e3f8/thank-you-for-signing-the-pledge-9248185?e=8c8e704ee6)
---
Peter,
My name is Tim Baxter and I am an advocate for limited government, free markets, and individual liberty.

As a former New Hampshire state representative with an unblemished voting record on the House Republican Alliance Constitutional Conservative scorecard, and a candidate for Congress in 2022 that was endorsed by Senator Rand Paul and Representative Thomas Massie, I have a deep commitment to the principles that CANH stands for.

I'm proud to serve on the board of Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire, an organization dedicated to preserving small government ideals in our state, and I look forward to working with Executive Director Dan Gray in protecting our Constitutional freedoms.

CANH was founded in 2020 with the goal of protecting and preserving our constitutional rights. As part of this mission, CANH established The Pledge for candidates running for office in New Hampshire.
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=e3296e6c29&e=8c8e704ee6)
| [CLICK HERE TO CHIP IN $20.23 OR MORE TODAY >>>](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=943ac70638&e=8c8e704ee6)
---
The Pledge is a pledge of fiscal responsibility and limited government that candidates must sign to affirm their commitment to these principles if elected. Signees agree to fight for greater transparency in government and to oppose new taxes and fees. They also agree to adhere to the principles of a limited government set forth in the United States Constitution.

I believe that, as citizens of New Hampshire, it's important for us to be informed about candidates running for office who will uphold these principles. I'm proud to serve on the board of CANH and support its mission to protect our Constitutional rights.

I am asking you to join me in supporting this important movement. Together we can make a difference and ensure that our state remains focused on freedom and liberty.
Visit [**www.CitizensAllianceNH.org**](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=3a51bd600d&e=8c8e704ee6) to learn more and get involved!
For Liberty,
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=0c2b07f4ce&e=8c8e704ee6)
Tim Baxter
Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire
| | | | [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=3b5cefff94&e=8c8e704ee6)| [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=f8e21fab7f&e=8c8e704ee6)| [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=25172fc8f6&e=8c8e704ee6)

body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=d1932dfa8e934644b0ca026de86f7f4d&_e=ZbYfS9TS7LrS37nRgrH0u6gOQLKFSIZcSOcSXWB-xUUth90TdDmYfqEdTxUZrMkJgV-X0Ci3BV69bFApXp4RLos-t9_nyT_T0eBvyfQCdYLvWcKKRCWRa1_rJjzV9hipr_PNgVJJNtv8P8KbmuxhJXl4eozXPrpGrbxoGABb248EN7dCj0941HKKqlwNMNSRu2yK4gUw_B2QowFb17YVyA%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
America is in a fight for global primacy. With a stalled economy, an open border, China threatening our way of life, and failed leadership in Washington, the sad fact is we’re falling behind. But there’s nothing inevitable about American decline. What matters is what we do next, and that’s what my good friend Dave McCormick’s new book, _Superpower in Peril_ , is all about.
---
[](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=d1932dfa8e934644b0ca026de86f7f4d&_e=ZbYfS9TS7LrS37nRgrH0u6gOQLKFSIZcSOcSXWB-xUUpiTrfBL7D4aooXKk_m4r5zyuPNhS-7Zb9EOFGdZLgnEy0XMv7hrpT24RV2BTDtLdnDi6J3slY8NER_9I1fWMp1Toc_Nkw_wMk5QDqkM_YjN1efR0T6gQ0YKjCXkYIKfmSft-UNvBgUy8e9nIVknN-nTyEKfiRIJNve_4U682sKg%3D%3D)

There’s no one more qualified than Dave to show us the way forward. Drawing on leadership lessons from his time as an Army paratrooper, as a CEO and business leader, and at the highest levels of government, he presents a battle plan for American renewal that would:
* Revitalize the American Dream
* Revolutionize our economy
* Confront China
* Revive the soul of America

_Superpower in Peril_ comes out March 14. Don’t miss your chance to pre-order it today from **[Amazon](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=d1932dfa8e934644b0ca026de86f7f4d&_e=ZbYfS9TS7LrS37nRgrH0u6gOQLKFSIZcSOcSXWB-xUVONHjE9LMhwRxjRBIaI9Jsgwf5pqOQQIZMmozSEkkqpFbUwavJOJS9SDoxGJc3DflHlCdCIV2ldegULOcDEKBEpLW_aVzS3clKbWA6i3I76LZtG-SGRykgKEuv3-72JMOQxLI8Pz3WTnfXtO_TKAuNCz3do-Zbvqny8Xx4L9bStA%3D%3D)**! name: Kamala Harris
subject: Will you make a $10 donation to the DNC to renew your membership? When you do, you will receive your own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card in the mail.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | |
---
This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. **[Will you make a $10 donation to the DNC to renew your membership? When you do, you’ll receive your own personalized Official 2023 DNC Membership Card in the clean_body: Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. | | This grassroots team has helped make immense progress for the American people. In 2022, we capped the price of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare, made the largest investment in climate in a generation, passed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation in the last 30 years, protected same-sex marriage through federal law, invested in the removal of lead pipes, expanded health care for veterans, and so much more. We have a lot to be proud of, but there’s still more to do this year. Building a better America depends on whether we put in the work to elect more Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- and a well-funded DNC is key to winning in every corner of the country. As the only party organization responsible for electing Democrats from the school board to the Senate, the DNC powers critical programs that help to protect our fundamental rights, hold the GOP accountable, and provide Democratic candidates nationwide with the resources necessary to win. Last November’s midterms were only the most recent step in our work to pass the Biden-Harris agenda and lower costs for working families. The DNC is already making critical investments in organizing and voter protection efforts that Democrats will rely on to win in the years to come, but they need your support. We appreciate all of your hard work. It means so much. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. subject: The 2024 Indiana political landscape is coming into clear view

Peter, The 2024 Indiana political landscape is coming into clear view. We’re seeing the national trends of the Republican Party happening right here in Indiana: Republicans are divided and fighting amongst themselves. As extreme Republicans like Mike Braun jockey for position, **Democrats have an opportunity to capitalize on their arrogance and extremism.** We know that the key to success in politics is a long-term commitment to organizing at the local level. That’s why we’re committed to investing in municipal elections in 2023, flipping as many mayoral seats as we can, and setting ourselves up for success in 2024. [**If you’re with us, chip in $10 to our cause and help us build a safer, stronger Indiana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57724541/388943767/1643342139?refcode=230124-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWU3OTI0OC0yNzljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oHbSgs68VAmuRdoLCMF0Bq6AyBopoHF5cNuV49VIJ6I=) As Republicans continue to look to the past, like the 2020 election, and invoke unnecessary culture wars, Democratic candidates and officials are focused on the future of our state and the issues that matter most to Hoosiers. body:

| |
---
| | |
Hi, Peter - Nikki Haley here.

**I have an important message for you today, so I 've included a private link for your eyes only. **

| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243066:6UXnWdGQN:m:1:3367311000:41519A7F91C986630E6DC72557497EEE:r)
---

Peter, I'm inviting you to join my exclusive Ambassador's Circle - a premier club for patriots dedicated to taking back our country and defeating the liberal agenda.

_**[I'm only extending invitations to top conservatives in certain areas, which is why I'm reaching out to you today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243066:6UXnWdGQN:m:1:3367311000:41519A7F91C986630E6DC72557497EEE:r "I’m only extending invitations to top conservatives in certain areas, which is why
I’m reaching out to you today.")**_

---
| | [ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243066:6UXnWdGQN:m:1:3367311000:41519A7F91C986630E6DC72557497EEE:r)
---

Members will have exclusive access to the inner circle of patriots standing against the radical Left. _**[Since this club is reserved for the most elite, I can only keep your invitation active for the next 2 hours, so you must accept ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243066:6UXnWdGQN:m:1:3367311000:41519A7F91C986630E6DC72557497EEE:r "Since this club is reserved for the most elite, I can only keep your invitation active for the
next 2 hours, so you must accept ASAP.")**_

---

Once your invitation expires, I will be forced to invite the next person in your area.

I hope to see your name on the list of those who accepted.

My very best,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243066:6UXnWdGQN:m:1:3367311000:41519A7F91C986630E6DC72557497EEE:r)
---
Nikki Haley
---
* * *

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62243067:6UXnWdGQN:m:1:3367311000:41519A7F91C986630E6DC72557497EEE:r "Nikki Haley Book")
---

When I was growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys Club and my opponent thought that women didn't belong in politics. People thought I was too brown...too female...too young...too conservative...too principled... Well, I said: Too bad! I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. I want to share the stories of these incredible women with you and hope you will be inspired, too. That's why I wrote this book!

clean_body: | | | Friend, it's officially 2023, and the GOP has taken over the House. Now, they're scheming to take back the Senate and White House in 2024. Unless TOP supporters like you activate your 2023 Democratic Membership today, I'm afraid they'll succeed. = | | = Democrats NARROWLY held onto the Senate majority in November, which wouldn't have happened without TOP Democrats like you, friend. So, please, help us start the new year off on the right foot and show the GOP we're ready for a fight. We all know this will be an uphill battle, so I need 1,000 new members to activate their membership before midnight.Will you join me? = | | = Let's get to work! – James Carville | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. name: Team Evergreen
subject: Our virtual event is near capacity – but you can still join the livestream!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We're live right now, and it's not too late to join.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=2&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK) Friend, **we had an extraordinary number of RSVPs** to today's virtual event with Sen. Tina Smith, Dr. Leah Stokes, Manish Bapna, and Lissa Lynch. **It just started, and we might hit capacity.** [_**If the Zoom call is full when you try to join—or if you didn't RSVP but still want to check it out—don't worry: We're streaming the event live on YouTube! Click here to watch it right now.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=3&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK) | [WATCH LIVE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=4&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK)
---
— Team Evergreen
\------ Forwarded message ------
From: **Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action**
Date: Tue, Jan 24, 2023
Subject: Will I see you today?
This Tuesday, I'm sitting down with a panel of climate champions to unveil our new clean power roadmap—and friend, I'm hoping you'll join us.
[_**RSVP right now for the live virtual event with Senator Tina Smith, Dr. Leah Stokes, Manish Bapna, and Lissa Lynch on Tuesday, January 24 at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=5&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK)
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=6&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK)
[RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=7&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK)
---
President Biden made a pledge to the American people to achieve 100% clean electricity by 2035, and together with NRDC (Natural Resources Defense Council), we're revealing the roadmap Biden can use to get us there.
**Want to learn about the roadmap and hear how you can help get the U.S. to 100% clean power?**
[_**Join me and our line-up of climate champions for "Evergreen Action and NRDC Present: Roadmap to 100% Clean Power", airing live next Tuesday, January 24 at 4 p.m. ET / 1 p.m. PT.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=8&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK)
Onward,
Sam Ricketts
Co-founder, Evergreen Action
[RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4424?t=9&akid=13244%2E53494%2EOfSYvK)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: Update on South Carolina and Other States
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

A lot has happened across our network of state freedom caucuses since we emailed you yesterday.

**SOUTH CAROLINA**

If you’re just reading about this for the first time, the SC Freedom Caucus was kicked out of the House GOP Caucus late last week in Columbia for refusing to sign leadership’s “loyalty oath” which prevents lawmakers from telling voters why their “Republican” colleagues are killing conservative bills.

Now, former Senator and conservative hero Jim DeMint weighed in with [an op-ed](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=c4877da329&e=64ecec6d03) in a local news outlet. Key excerpt:

_“Instead of passing draconian rules meant to muzzle conservative members, why doesn’t the House GOP Caucus and its members support the reform-minded conservative fighters who are standing on principle in opposition to this pledge? In a state where education is near the bottom in almost every category, where the state income tax is still the highest in the Southeast, and where legislators are choosing judges who believe it’s okay to kill babies, why are we looking to ostracize and attack the members most devoted to fixing these problems?”_

Also, on Monday, we asked you to **sign[a petition](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=d68517ab1f&e=64ecec6d03) to show your support for the SC Freedom Caucus**. As of today, it has 1,028 signatures! Please be sure to sign it if you haven’t already.

Finally, **tune into the Glenn Beck radio show tomorrow morning at 9:30am ET** to hear SC Freedom Caucus Chairman Adam Morgan talk about this ongoing fight.

**MISSISSIPPI**

The Mississippi State Senate is set to debate SB 2323 as early as this week. This horrible bill would give the government-owned University of Mississippi Medical Center the ability to buy out rural and community hospitals, thus consolidating its power. Thankfully, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus is fighting this bill. MSFC Chair Dana Criswell said, “This is an attempt at a complete government takeover of our hospital system in Mississippi. This will create a huge government-protected monopoly, driving out competition and ultimately putting private hospitals out of business.”

To be clear, this dumb bill is being pushed by Republicans in a Republican supermajority state. This is yet another reminder that not all Republicans elected to office are really conservative, let alone moderately Republican. They are full blown liberals.

The Mississippi Republican Party website even stresses that the party’s official position is to promote free-market competition in healthcare. Yet this bill does the opposite.

If you live in the Magnolia State, **please call Lt. Gov. Delbert Hosemann** and tell him to kill this bill. He presides over the Senate and is currently in support of this bill. The **sponsor of the bill is Sen. Joey Fillingane** , a moderate Republican who has a long history of voting for corporate welfare and cronyism. **You can call either at the capitol switchboard at (601)345-1211, and request your call to be routed to their offices.**

**IDAHO**

A big school choice battle is brewing in Idaho. In one corner, we have the Idaho Freedom Caucus and the State Republican Party – both are advocating for a big expansion of school choice. In the other corner, we have “Republican” Governor Brad Little and the state education superintendent, Debbie Critchfield. Both of whom are on record against school choice.

It’s worth mentioning that the State GOP Platform endorses universal school choice. Yet another example of Republicans betraying their party’s official positions.

This week is “Education Week” in the state capitol. So expect this battle to become fully engaged very quickly. School choice is sweeping the nation. With the support of the Arizona Freedom Caucus members, they now have universal school choice in the Grand Canyon State. Utah, Iowa, and Florida are some other states that are moving quickly for universal expansion. Every state should be doing this, but certainly every red state. If Idaho isn’t able to do it, it’s because liberals masquerading as Republicans are thwarting it. In the coming days and weeks, the Idaho Freedom Caucus will be fighting them and will need your support. Stay tuned.

**MONTANA**

The Montana Freedom Caucus publicly launched last week with the support of House Freedom Caucus member, Rep. Matt Rosendale. Tying together the fact that the HFC fought Kevin McCarthy earlier this month during the speaker fight in DC, and the launch of the MT Freedom Caucus, Rosendale [said](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=ef564b58d3&e=64ecec6d03),

“What you saw play out in Washington is what the power of a small group can do,” Rosendale said to a large crowd in the Capitol’s old Supreme Court chambers. “This [MT] freedom caucus is going to be ... the tip of the spear.”

Naturally, the Far Left responded with hysterics. Letters to the editor of one liberal newspaper had these fun headlines: “The New Freedom Caucus Isn’t About Freedom” and “The Freedom Oppress Caucus”.

Sounds like we’re right over the target!

Please [donate](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=99a72908d5&e=64ecec6d03) to the State Freedom Caucus Network today so that our freedom-loving lawmakers can continue their great work to support families, faith, and freedom. **The best way to save our country is to fight in the states. So we need your help!**

**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
**President**
**State Freedom Caucus Network**

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [recurring ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=0376bbffa4&e=64ecec6d03)[contribution](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=6fd86ff61b&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=5943d3d099&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=821c52d89a&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=cc553003b1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=cc553003b1).

During his previous time in this office, Horne led multiple attacks on public education – _despite his job title_ – and opened the floodgates for charter schools and vouchers. He’s even trying to prevent bilingual learning, and brought Republican culture wars to the classroom before it was fashionable.

Tom’s election back to this seat is proof we still have a lot to do here in Arizona. And we rely on our grassroots team to help us come up with the resources we need to win races like these.

**[Team, we’ve made great strides winning elections in Arizona, but Horne’s election means there is unfinished work.
