name: Brit Bender
subject: re: We Have to Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic PartyCarol V
body:
Over the weekend, we should have been celebrating reproductive freedom on the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade. Instead, Tennesseans who need an abortion are unable to make their own healthcare decisions.

On August 25th, 2022, all abortion services in Tennessee ended. Having less rights now than I did just seven months ago terrifies me. Not only for myself, but for the thousands of people across Tennessee that this cruel decision affects.

Until we make major changes to our state government, our reproductive rights will constantly be under attack. This is why we have got to push back again and again until we win back our rights.

We must increase Democratic power in our state legislature to have a chance at safeguarding our abortion rights. Rush a $20 donation right now to help get more Democrats into office here in TN. → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_l1&amount=20]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10] $20 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_EL20&express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode2=EL20]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_EL50&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=EL50] $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode2=EL100]
$250 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_EL250&express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode2=EL100] OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_ELOther&refcode2=ELother]

Our reproductive rights are squarely in the hands of our state legislature which is filled with Republicans who want to control every aspect of our lives. We deserve representatives who speak for the people, but it's going to take hard work to get there.

Can you rush $20 to help us fight for a more representative government in Tennessee? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/saveabortion?refcode=_l2&amount=20]

In solidarity,

Brit Bender
she/her
Executive Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who fight for working people. Can you help us win back our state by giving monthly?

clean_body: Over the weekend, we should have been celebrating reproductive freedom on the 50th anniversary of Roe v. Wade. Instead, Tennesseans who need an abortion are unable to make their own healthcare decisions. On August 25th, 2022, all abortion services in Tennessee ended. Having less rights now than I did just seven months ago terrifies me. Not only for myself, but for the thousands of people across Tennessee that this cruel decision affects. Until we make major changes to our state government, our reproductive rights will constantly be under attack. This is why we have got to push back again and again until we win back our rights. We must increase Democratic power in our state legislature to have a chance at safeguarding our abortion rights. Rush a $20 donation right now to help get more Democrats into office here in TN. → [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: $10 » [] $20 » [] $50 » [] $100 » [] $250 » [] OTHER » [] Our reproductive rights are squarely in the hands of our state legislature which is filled with Republicans who want to control every aspect of our lives. We deserve representatives who speak for the people, but it's going to take hard work to get there. Can you rush $20 to help us fight for a more representative government in Tennessee? [] In solidarity, Brit Bender she/her Executive Director, Tennessee Democratic Party The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who fight for working people. Can you help us win back our state by giving monthly? DONATE MONTHLY [] Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic PartyCarol V. Abney, Treasurer. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Tennessee Democratic Party are not tax deductible. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The political establishment is coming after us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First: Our own fundraising has been steadily declining over the last year
and it’s unsustainable for our organization — if things don’t turn around
we’re going to have to look at budget cuts.

Then: Axios just reported that ‘The Moderate PAC’ is planning on raising
$20 million to stop our movement and protect corporate-backed, entrenched
incumbents.

Now: We urgently need your support to fight back against this PAC that
received $1,000,000 from a GOP-mega donor and billionaire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230124-27214&t=1001&akid=27214%2E1203867%2Exo72sf ]Will you rush a contribution of $3 right now? As a
grassroots-funded organization, every single donation truly makes a
difference to us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230124-27214&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27214%2E1203867%2Exo72sf ]Contribute $3

The political establishment is coming after us because they’re terrified
of our people-powered movement that is actually shifting political power
in our country to the 99%.

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, or
Cori Bush in Congress. We recruited each of these leaders to run and win
and we’re building the infrastructure for even more grassroots candidates
to do the same, but the Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20
million against us and our candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230124-27214&t=1021&akid=27214%2E1203867%2Exo72sf ]Please make your best gift now to help us counter this obscene amount
of money against us.

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27214%2E1203867%2Exo72sf ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27214%2E1203867%2Exo72sf ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230124-27214-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27214_1203867_xo72sf&akid=27214%2E1203867%2Exo72sf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27214%2E1203867%2Exo72sf

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that.

| Peter -

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to split a donation between my campaign and UniteDemocracts:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q12023_spl-gallego](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57727253/388952389/706927117?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230124_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ODc3MDc1LTMyOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XHVR3Q_NDdEERSHuQ0NusbxNkWaxb0K507l3M16aI2c=) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57727257/388952393/706927117?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230124_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ODc3MDc1LTMyOWMtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XHVR3Q_NDdEERSHuQ0NusbxNkWaxb0K507l3M16aI2c=)
---
Here is the truth:

The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one.

And that is why I am asking:

[Can you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and UniteDemocrats to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this race. clean_body: I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that. | Peter - I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona. If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to split a donation between my campaign and UniteDemocracts: = | = Here is the truth: The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help. For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more. Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong. I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I am going to change that. But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one. And that is why I am asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ruben Gallego and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Ruben Gallego | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. name: Pramila's iPhone
subject: Will you stand with workers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
From the very first day I launched my campaign for Congress, I have remained vocal in my support for working people and the unions that advocate for millions of Americans. For years, I have fought to advance labor protections, strengthen support for unions, and ensure union workers have a seat at the table.
Since then, we’ve lived through a devastating pandemic that exposed so many of the ways we are failing workers — poverty wages, hazardous working conditions, inadequate sick pay, and grueling hours. **We also saw a labor revolution ignite across the country with workers staging historic unionizing efforts in Starbucks, Amazon, Apple, and more.**
I am incredibly proud to stand with workers across Seattle, Washington, and the country as we fight for workers everywhere. Last week, I spent time with local labor leaders as we discussed top priorities for the upcoming session of Congress. **We’re going to keep fighting, and I’m asking you to stand with us.**
[**Peter, it’s my duty to relentlessly push a bold, pro-worker agenda forward through any avenue I can — but I need your support to maintain our momentum in this new term. Can you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, to stand with us?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26134?refcode=em20230124-2088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2088%2E420207%2EZf8WEv)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26134?refcode=em20230124-2088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2088%2E420207%2EZf8WEv)
_Pramila with local Washington labor leaders last week._
The Republicans may try to slow our momentum or throw up roadblocks, but we won’t be stopped. The pandemic only showed what we’ve known for a long time now: that we are long overdue to increase federal protections for workers.
We have the roadmap for it with the PRO Act, which I have championed from its inception as an original cosponsor — and we won’t stop until it’s passed. It’s critical that we maintain public support so we keep the pressure up on Congress.
[**I’m asking you to donate any amount you can today while I continue this fight. Can I count on you, Peter?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/26134?refcode=em20230124-2088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2088%2E420207%2EZf8WEv)
Thank you for standing with me,
Pramila
(Sent from my iPhone)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230124-2088-footer&t=4&refcode2=2088_420207_Zf8WEv&akid=2088%2E420207%2EZf8WEv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2088%2E420207%2EZf8WEv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2088%2E420207%2EZf8WEv)

clean_body: Are You With Me? | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hey, Peter! It's Senator Ted Budd. With 2023 already underway, I want to make something clear: I will never stop fighting for your freedoms. A lot of politicians don't want you to know why they serve day-in and day-out, but I want to make sure that you know why I fought so hard for this senate seat. As we head towards new goals together, I am grateful to know that you are on my team. Have you considered pitching into my first fundraising goal of this year? | It might seem that after winning, your work is over.But that is simply not the case! We can always fight for more. The Senate Majority stayed with Chuck Schumer's Democrats, so your continued support has never been more crucial. I cannot thank you enough for being on my team. Sincerely, Senator Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | She's one of many governors across the nation championing the effort to bring as many education choices as possible to parents and children, such as:
* **Education Savings Accounts**
* **Vouchers**
* **Scholarship Tax Credits**
* **Individual Tax Credits**
* **Public Charter and Magnet Schools**

Team, Gabe ran for Congress to be a true representative of the people of New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. Now that we’re coming up on the end of his first month in Washington, he wants to hear from you! As long as Gabe is in office, he plans to reach out and listen to the feedback, concerns, and priorities of the people he was elected to serve. So far, we’ve seen the far-right GOP waste taxpayer dollars on a vanity Speaker race, further attack women’s right to choose, and propose cuts to Social Security and Medicare — and Gabe is fighting back. **[As we close out the first month of 2023, will you take our January survey to share your thoughts with Gabe as we look ahead to the rest of the year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57728821/388955781/-13636946?refcode=fl_em_su_20230123jansurvey_tv_od60ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzU2YzM0OS0zODljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YC2n86HTTvEcmKrr9lnPQ7mI9yRnBLR3ncGIaKTxpgQ=&emci=9556c349-389c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9756c349-389c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57728822/388955782/-13636946?refcode=fl_em_su_20230123jansurvey_tv_od60ds_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzU2YzM0OS0zODljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YC2n86HTTvEcmKrr9lnPQ7mI9yRnBLR3ncGIaKTxpgQ=&emci=9556c349-389c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=9756c349-389c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4482565)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Oversight 101
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Oversight is an important (but often overlooked) responsibility of Congress:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16483%2E3422442%2EPX9bRe)
Derek, in Congress I’m a proud member of the Oversight Committee. But my oversight work began even before I was elected.
Earlier in my career, I was a consumer protection attorney. And in 2012 I got a call from then Attorney General of California, Kamala Harris. She had secured an $18 billion settlement from Wall Street Banks whose predatory lending practices had caused the 2008 mortgage crisis and left 700,000 California families in or near foreclosure.**It was then my job as California’s Independent Monitor to make sure people actually got the money the banks owed them.** My team and I held the banks’ feet to the fire and made sure California families received the compensation they were entitled to.
**Holding power to account to deliver for California families is still a big part of my job**. Oversight is an important (but often overlooked) responsibility of Congress:
* I _oversee_ how our tax dollars are spent. **It’s one thing to pass legislation that creates good programs. It’s another to make sure those programs are run effectively and efficiently**. If people don’t know about a program that could help them, or there are too many hoops to jump through—that program isn’t all that effective and becomes wasteful. When our tax dollars are spent subsidizing Big Oil or lining the defense industry’s pockets, I call it out.
* I also _oversee_ corporations when they harm workers or consumers, and on the first of this year **my new law cracking down on Big Pharma’s price gouging went into effect.**
* I _oversee_ our government officials. When Louis DeJoy was mishandling the Postal Service, we demanded change. When I learned my colleagues in Congress were trading stocks based on the information they learned in Washington,**I introduced legislation to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.**

I’m proud to stand up to CEOs, government officials, and special interest lobbyists who aren’t acting in the best interest of California families. The work of holding power to account is so important, and really does affect our everyday lives.
**[I’m running for Senate because Californians deserve a warrior in Washington to do this work. Consider making a contribution today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15825?amount=5&refcode=EMAF24_1_OVR_20230124_V1_F&t=2&akid=16483%2E3422442%2EPX9bRe)**

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Kevin McCarthy and Republicans want to gut Social Security and Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Kevin McCarthy made concessions to the most extreme members of his party in order to become speaker of the House. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57731388/388957921/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTRlZjNkNi0zYTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NjTu3QfyN39BGfHT_EYamNl8ScLxVDou0Yt2g1YU88=&emci=a049c9f3-f69b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=6a4ef3d6-3a9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

For decades, Social Security and Medicare have been critical in helping millions of hard-working Americans live and retire with dignity and security. But with Republicans in control of the House, these earned benefits are now at risk.

Kevin McCarthy made concessions to the most extreme members of his party in order to become speaker of the House. **Included was a promise not to raise the debt ceiling without making cuts to Social Security and Medicare.**

Republicans have made it clear that robbing Americans of their earned benefits is at the top of their priorities. That's unacceptable.

Our country made a promise that if you work hard and pay in, Social Security will be there for you when you need it the most. That's why Kim is fighting back against these attacks in Congress to ensure we keep that promise, but she needs to know you have her back.

**[If you're with Kim in the fight to defend Social Security and Medicare, add your name to stand with her now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57731391/388957922/-2004625449?ms=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=chuiuSa0av3zsINnzFZWhJ1Xw36gh0s9/BfSqUX+k83QS6iVro7DjFbI4alqFqlgCp0F3k79Zxq4f3OQcsTHCWuG0RYxJa39vZENa/PEIDQHRBIBhTvvIQD6k4LGHaTZ7S9ub9H4wg4Py7dSMLPYxA/AyCFkvLoZuvh6FC4/B1w=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTRlZjNkNi0zYTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NjTu3QfyN39BGfHT_EYamNl8ScLxVDou0Yt2g1YU88=&emci=a049c9f3-f69b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=6a4ef3d6-3a9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57731393/388957934/-2004625449?ms=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230124_ssmedi_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=chuiuSa0av3zsINnzFZWhJ1Xw36gh0s9/BfSqUX+k83QS6iVro7DjFbI4alqFqlgCp0F3k79Zxq4f3OQcsTHCWuG0RYxJa39vZENa/PEIDQHRBIBhTvvIQD6k4LGHaTZ7S9ub9H4wg4Py7dSMLPYxA/AyCFkvLoZuvh6FC4/B1w=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTRlZjNkNi0zYTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5NjTu3QfyN39BGfHT_EYamNl8ScLxVDou0Yt2g1YU88=&emci=a049c9f3-f69b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=6a4ef3d6-3a9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

clean_body: Kevin McCarthy made concessions to the most extreme members of his party in order to become speaker of the House. Peter, For decades, Social Security and Medicare have been critical in helping millions of hard-working Americans live and retire with dignity and security. But with Republicans in control of the House, these earned benefits are now at risk. Kevin McCarthy made concessions to the most extreme members of his party in order to become speaker of the House. Included was a promise not to raise the debt ceiling without making cuts to Social Security and Medicare. Republicans have made it clear that robbing Americans of their earned benefits is at the top of their priorities. That's unacceptable. Our country made a promise that if you work hard and pay in, Social Security will be there for you when you need it the most. That's why Kim is fighting back against these attacks in Congress to ensure we keep that promise, but she needs to know you have her back. | Thanks, Team Schrier = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

body:
Hi friend,
We hope the first month of 2023 is treating you well, and you’ve been able to keep your new year’s resolutions so far. We’ve been working hard to keep our resolution of getting things done for Minnesotans. You can help us by contributing a completely refundable gift to the Minnesota House DFL today! The Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program allows you to make a $50 (or $100 per couple) donation once per year and have it refunded by the state. Can we count on your $50 contribution today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: Wisconsin’s Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57736518/388961281/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzQ4MzZiYi0zZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-Tt4OBxZE89gROwLv21mE5nf_fChYjY1Ah5I0DvN28=&emci=49dad0f1-3e9b-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=c74836bb-3e9c-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! [**_In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and the Democratic Party of Georgia._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57736519/388961282/2063583167?refcode=20230124.2_TB_1AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzQ4MzZiYi0zZTljLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-Tt4OBxZE89gROwLv21mE5nf_fChYjY1Ah5I0DvN28=) But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of the race for Senate here in Wisconsin, and why your support is so important, especially right now.

Wisconsin’s last elections have been decided by the slimmest of margins.

As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won Wisconsin by less than _one point._ Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.

So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.**

So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red.

We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game _(we’ve done it before!)_ but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking:

[**_Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia? clean_body: | | | Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! = But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of the race for Senate here in Wisconsin, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Wisconsin’s last elections have been decided by the slimmest of margins. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won Wisconsin by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. In fact,The Hill has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much for your continued support. I know it’s early to be thinking about 2024, but in a race as competitive as this one will be, early investments will make all the difference. — Tammy | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia.
